programme.title: The Baby Club
programme.desc: Giovanna and Baby Bear welcome babies Alara, Samaa, Reece, Eleanor, Ty’lana and their grown-ups to The Baby Club. Parents, carers and their little ones at home are invited to join in with all the fun activities too! Inside Giovanna’s bag is are some scented lavender bags, and all the parents and babies have different objects and toys that are smelly. These are explored through discovery, play, song and story. Grown-ups at home are encouraged to take part by hiding safe, baby-appropriate smelly objects and toys inside a fabric bag or pillowcase for them to reveal and explore with their baby! The children’s nursery rhyme Ring A Ring O' Roses features, as does a story involving Baby Bear, and viewers at home show how they’ve been exploring smelly things too. The Action Song gets everyone moving about before some calm time with sensory lights and the Goodbye Song.

programme.title: My Very First
programme.desc: Join six-month-old Erin and Leo as they discover the world around them and start trying new foods for the first time. At home, we meet Erin and her family as everyone is playing and pretending to make phone calls on bananas. Meanwhile, Leo is playing on the swings at the local park, but soon it's time for his daily feed, while his sister stops to enjoy a delicious gingerbread man. After a short picnic, the family feeds the ducks and geese before Leo tries a rice cake for the very first time. At the petting farm, Erin and her family get the chance to feed some goats and hold a baby chick. The family have a picnic with juicy oranges and scrumptious sandwiches, while Erin has a bottle of milk. Leo’s family head home, where mum and Charlotte make a tasting platter for Leo, filled with fresh foods and a yummy yoghurt! At the dinner table, Erin’s mum dishes up a tasty meal - but will she like it?

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: It's Befriend a Bug Day, but Love Monster keeps accidentally annoying or scaring the bugs in his garden. When Elder Kitten reminds him that he is DJing at the Befriend a Bug party later, he starts practising his beatboxing. He notices some caterpillars on a nearby branch dancing to the music, but when he tries to approach them, they get frightened and curl up. Realising that they aren't afraid of him while he makes music, Love Monster builds them a miniature stage and happily performs for them. But when the party starts, they all appear to have vanished - or so it seems...

programme.desc: Grandma comes to look after George and Freddie for the day and helps the boys make some special biscuits for Mum. But there’s extra excitement in store when it starts to snow! Will there be enough to build a snowman? Will Grandma brave the sledge? And what will mum think of those biscuits?

programme.title: Maddie's Do You Know?
programme.desc: Maddie is in the kitchen. She uses a special waterproof camera to see how the dishwasher works to clean dirty dishes. An animation shows what happens inside once the door is closed and how the spray arms spin to spread the water around. Next, Maddie visits a sustainable forest to see where wood comes from and to see how trees are felled. She then goes to a furniture workshop to see how the wood is made into a wooden table

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When horsing around with Dad goes too far, Bingo learns about finding her big girl voice.

programme.desc: Gram and Grand visit. Waffle loves Gram; he'll only leave his new dog doormat for her

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: A wrong bus later and the pair are back where they started! It's time to look at the schedule and see when their bus is due to arrive.

programme.desc: Dylan talks about his hero Serena Williams, professional tennis player and cultural icon

programme.title: Woolly & Tig
programme.desc: A boy pushes Tig by accident at nursery school, leaving her scared to go back. However, Woolly tells her the importance of sharing her worries

programme.title: Moon and Me
programme.desc: Everybody is quietly reading books when the little toy tub appears

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: Tiny and Small discover the froglets sitting abnormally silent and calm in their cave, in front of three stones which glow blue and emit an unearthly sound. Major Clanger think these must be 'hush stones' however the effect is anything but calming

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: Everything in the garden is noisy, so Igglepiggle moves away to find a quiet place

programme.title: CBeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.desc: A tale is read for younger viewers before they go to bed

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: The Andrew Marr Show
programme.desc: A round-up of the week's stories, featuring interviews with key figures in politics and current affairs and a round-up of the Sunday papers. Including news and weather at 10.00

programme.title: Politics Wales
programme.desc: The latest political news and debate, and reports from around Wales, presented by James Williams

programme.title: Pentecost
programme.desc: Live service from All Saints Church, Woodford Wells, led by Rev Paul Harcourt, Becky Harcourt and Yasmin Omotosho, with music from All Saints' worship group, led by Martin Donovan

programme.title: Sunday Morning Stories
programme.desc: Rev Kate Bottley discovers unsung heroes, including a taxi driver helping his community through the pandemic, and a fire chief encouraging others to follow in her footsteps

programme.title: Pilgrimage: The Road to Santiago
programme.desc: On the final stretch of the Camino de Santiago pilgrimage, Ed Byrne, JJ Chalmers and the Rev Kate Bottley take a dip in the freezing water within a beautiful wooded valley. Neil Morrissey and Heather Small's snoring means some choose to sleep outside, Debbie McGee battles blisters, while journalist Raphael Rowe discovers it is the company of others that is spurring him on. As they near the end of their journey, it remains to be seen what the experience of re-enacting the 780km pilgrimage has meant to the participants and whether they can identify any lasting change within themselves. Narrated by Lee Ingleby

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sean Fletcher and Pam Rhodes present an episode for Pentecost Sunday, meeting an ultra-marathon runner and learning about monastic life and a biblical-inspired cartoon

programme.title: Points of View
programme.desc: Viewers' opinions on BBC shows and behind-the-scenes reports on new programmes

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a London couple who have a £700,000 budget to leave the capital and put down retirement roots in East Sussex. While in the county, Nicki rides the Hastings East Hill Cliff Railway, the UK's steepest funicular railway

programme.title: Frozen (2013)
programme.desc: A princess with the power to freeze anything she touches loses control of her abilities and plunges the kingdom into a perpetual winter. She goes into hiding, but her sister remains determined that she can be saved from her own magic and sets off on a quest to find her, aided by a mountain man and a living snowman. Disney animated fantasy adventure, with the voices of Kristen Bell and Idina Menzel

programme.title: Iolo: The Last Wilderness of Wales
programme.desc: Iolo Williams continues his exploration of the Cambrian mountains, heading for the Elan Valley in search of cuckoos. As he soon discovers they are easy to hear but no so easy to see. He also finds red squirrels that are genetically unique to the Cambrians in a remote conifer plantation, and looks for golden plover, one of the rarest breeding birds in Wales, on the hills surrounding Plynlimon

programme.title: Weatherman Walking: The Welsh Coast
programme.desc: Derek Brockway starts his walk at Porthkerry, next to his home town. On his way to Llantwit Major he drops in for tea at Font-y-Carlo caravan park and tries his hand at stone-stacking on a pebble beach. Comedian Kiri Pritchard McLean takes a nostalgic trip to Barry Lido, while Mo Jannah explores the stories of the African sailors who made south Wales their home

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Special episode devoted to community gardens and planting wildflowers, exploring their benefits both to the well-being of the people who make use of them and to the environment, with positive influences on climate change and bee populations. Matt Baker and Margherita Taylor help Bristol locals to create a community plot, and Charlotte Smith visits a blooming project in Glasgow. Sean Fletcher reports on a field to fork project involving children in Northern Ireland, and Helen Skelton meets a botanist working to preserve endangered wildflowers

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Forty Hall in Enfield, north London, where items include Chippendale tables with a hefty price tag, an original Punch and Judy set used to entertain children on the lawns of the hall, and an intriguing necklace linked to a secret society. There is also rare rock memorabilia, including a poster of Mick Jagger by Andy Warhol

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Trixie stirs up controversy in the community when she speaks out on behalf of a patient who is pregnant with her fifth child, but whose personal life is far from stable. Dr Turner and Sister Frances try to help a woman who is refusing medical treatment through the last weeks of her pregnancy, and Nancy reveals a secret about her background that could threaten her relationship with Nonnatus House

programme.title: The Pursuit of Love
programme.desc: Fanny is furious at the decadent lifestyle Linda is leading in Paris with her lover, while also resenting her own unhappy marriage. However, as Europe stands on the brink of war, the divided cousins must learn to put their differences aside before it is too late

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents action from the final matches of the Premier League season, including Leicester City v Tottenham Hotspur at King Power Stadium and Liverpool v Crystal Palace at Anfield. Leicester prevailed 2-0 away to Spurs in December and will have been looking for another good result to end a strong campaign on a high. The Reds thrashed Palace 7-0 in the reverse fixture to spend Christmas at the top of the table, but their form dipped dramatically following that match. Plus, Arsenal v Brighton & Hove Albion, Aston Villa v Chelsea, Fulham v Newcastle United, Leeds United v West Bromwich Albion, Manchester City v Everton, Sheffield United v Burnley, West Ham United v Southampton and Wolverhampton Wanderers v Manchester United

programme.title: Match of the Day Top 10
programme.desc: Gary Lineker is joined by Micah Richards and Alan Shearer to count down 10 of the most memorable escapes from Premier League relegation

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Kym Marsh and Gethin Jones host the weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical chat and expert advice

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Three terraced properties feature in this programme, with Martin Roberts in Birmingham, Dion Dublin in Bradford and Martel Maxwell in Dover

programme.title: Fraud Squad
programme.desc: Michelle Ackerley reports on a nurse ripping off the NHS for £1000s, and the boss of a recycling firm who helped himself to millions in government money

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: A climber plunges hundreds of feet down a mountain in the Lake District, coming to rest above a precipice. Plus, a driver ploughs into a car blocking the fast lane of a motorway

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross visits the Ardingly International Antiques Fair, with experts Philip Serrell and Roo Irvine. He also visits a business that conserves historical artifacts

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Emma tries to help a patient who could be hiding something over the course of several consultations. Lucy Benjamin (Detectorists) guest stars in a special two-hander episode

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Over three rounds, contestants David, Raj, Jo and Sophy vie to find the single 'unbeatable' answer and streak ahead of the rest to make the final where they can win a cash prize. General knowledge quiz, hosted by Jason Manford

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Margherita Taylor helps a retired army couple to find a secluded new home in Norfolk, and also learns about the trade in the world's most expensive spice, saffron

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and the Rich Brothers come up with competing designs for a Bristol couple on a budget of £6500, The couple want to transform their large, disordered and overgrown garden into an urban suntrap reminiscent of their holidays in the Mediterranean

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques dealer Paul Martin makes his Road Trip debut alongside seasoned tripper Raj Bisram. A mysterious giant and a very cute dog also feature in this South Downs adventure

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Jermaine Jenas bring you the stories that matter from across the country

programme.title: X-Ray
programme.desc: Lucy Owen champions consumer rights, while reporter Rachel Treadaway-Williams challenges cowboys, conmen and companies who do not deliver on their promises

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Ruby is unimpressed with Martin's hangover and ends up having to go to a doctor's appointment by herself. At the gym launch, Sharon spots Zack turning on the charm with an important potential client, and Kheerat promises to have a word. Kat returns home from the hospital with Phil by her side, and Jean warns her about the Mitchells

programme.title: Fawlty Towers
programme.desc: The hotel is plunged into chaos by the death of a guest, leading to all manner of mayhem as Basil tries to conceal the corpse from the other occupants. Classic comedy, guest starring Geoffrey Palmer, with John Cleese and Prunella Scales

programme.title: The Pact
programme.desc: It is the day of Jack's memorial, and while the police investigation ramps up, the pact begins to fracture. Max realises what Arwel has done and arrests him, prompting a disbelieving Louie to confront him over dark family secrets. Anna's relationship with Max is strained when he realises their savings account has been emptied, and she is forced to weave a web of lies to keep her secret. As another blackmail message comes through, she reaches breaking point and decides to uncover who is behind the threats

programme.title: Elis James: Football Nation
programme.desc: A fan's-eye journey through the highs and lows of Welsh footballing history in the company of some of the game's best-known players, managers and supporters. The stand-up comedian charts the rise of the first sporting megastar from north-east Wales and a later boom and bust in the towns and valleys of the south that culminated in a cup win that was celebrate in all parts of the country

programme.title: Starstruck

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a London couple who have a £700,000 budget to leave the capital and put down retirement roots in East Sussex. While in the county, Nicki rides the Hastings East Hill Cliff Railway, the UK's steepest funicular railway

programme.title: Frozen (2013)
programme.desc: A princess with the power to freeze anything she touches loses control of her abilities and plunges the kingdom into a perpetual winter. She goes into hiding, but her sister remains determined that she can be saved from her own magic and sets off on a quest to find her, aided by a mountain man and a living snowman. Disney animated fantasy adventure, with the voices of Kristen Bell and Idina Menzel

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates footage of painted wolves on the banks of the Zambezi river, as an ageing matriarch faces a challenge for supremacy from her own daughter, who has grown to lead a pack of her own, which now needs to expand into new territory. With human-occupied land penning them in, the two packs are forced to fight for the little resources available

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Special episode devoted to community gardens and planting wildflowers, exploring their benefits both to the well-being of the people who make use of them and to the environment, with positive influences on climate change and bee populations. Matt Baker and Margherita Taylor help Bristol locals to create a community plot, and Charlotte Smith visits a blooming project in Glasgow. Sean Fletcher reports on a field to fork project involving children in Northern Ireland, and Helen Skelton meets a botanist working to preserve endangered wildflowers

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Forty Hall in Enfield, north London, where items include Chippendale tables with a hefty price tag, an original Punch and Judy set used to entertain children on the lawns of the hall, and an intriguing necklace linked to a secret society. There is also rare rock memorabilia, including a poster of Mick Jagger by Andy Warhol

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Trixie stirs up controversy in the community when she speaks out on behalf of a patient who is pregnant with her fifth child, but whose personal life is far from stable. Dr Turner and Sister Frances try to help a woman who is refusing medical treatment through the last weeks of her pregnancy, and Nancy reveals a secret about her background that could threaten her relationship with Nonnatus House

programme.title: The Pursuit of Love
programme.desc: Fanny is furious at the decadent lifestyle Linda is leading in Paris with her lover, while also resenting her own unhappy marriage. However, as Europe stands on the brink of war, the divided cousins must learn to put their differences aside before it is too late

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents action from the final matches of the Premier League season, including Leicester City v Tottenham Hotspur at King Power Stadium and Liverpool v Crystal Palace at Anfield. Leicester prevailed 2-0 away to Spurs in December and will have been looking for another good result to end a strong campaign on a high. The Reds thrashed Palace 7-0 in the reverse fixture to spend Christmas at the top of the table, but their form dipped dramatically following that match. Plus, Arsenal v Brighton & Hove Albion, Aston Villa v Chelsea, Fulham v Newcastle United, Leeds United v West Bromwich Albion, Manchester City v Everton, Sheffield United v Burnley, West Ham United v Southampton and Wolverhampton Wanderers v Manchester United

programme.title: Pilgrimage: The Road to Santiago
programme.desc: On the final stretch of the Camino de Santiago pilgrimage, Ed Byrne, JJ Chalmers and the Rev Kate Bottley take a dip in the freezing water within a beautiful wooded valley. Neil Morrissey and Heather Small's snoring means some choose to sleep outside, Debbie McGee battles blisters, while journalist Raphael Rowe discovers it is the company of others that is spurring him on. As they near the end of their journey, it remains to be seen what the experience of re-enacting the 780km pilgrimage has meant to the participants and whether they can identify any lasting change within themselves. Narrated by Lee Ingleby

programme.title: Barra's Return of the Wild
programme.desc: Barra Best reveals how endangered animals across Europe could be making a return with the help of conservationists. He discovers how red kite chicks have successfully been reintroduced to the Republic of Ireland, while on the slopes of Slieve Gullion, a native creature has helped a once endangered animal fight back against an invasive species. Further afield, Barra discovers how Arctic foxes are thriving in Norway and witnesses efforts to help a loggerhead turtle in Barcelona

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Ruby is unimpressed with Martin's hangover and ends up having to go to a doctor's appointment by herself. At the gym launch, Sharon spots Zack turning on the charm with an important potential client, and Kheerat promises to have a word. Kat returns home from the hospital with Phil by her side, and Jean warns her about the Mitchells

programme.title: Fawlty Towers
programme.desc: The hotel is plunged into chaos by the death of a guest, leading to all manner of mayhem as Basil tries to conceal the corpse from the other occupants. Classic comedy, guest starring Geoffrey Palmer, with John Cleese and Prunella Scales

programme.title: The Pact
programme.desc: It is the day of Jack's memorial, and while the police investigation ramps up, the pact begins to fracture. Max realises what Arwel has done and arrests him, prompting a disbelieving Louie to confront him over dark family secrets. Anna's relationship with Max is strained when he realises their savings account has been emptied, and she is forced to weave a web of lies to keep her secret. As another blackmail message comes through, she reaches breaking point and decides to uncover who is behind the threats

programme.title: True North
programme.desc: Documentary following the daily lives of a primary school teacher Tricia and her two children, who all have dwarfism, while her husband and their youngest child are of average height. The programme follows Tricia as she uses anti-bullying week as an opportunity to share her own childhood experiences with her class, and also reveals how her five-year-old son Noah is dealing with beginning to understand his condition

programme.title: Starstruck
programme.desc: Reeling from their fight, both Tom and Jessie struggle at work. Jessie reconsiders if London is the place for her. Sitcom, starring Rose Matafeo and Nikesh Patel

programme.title: Eating with My Ex
programme.desc: Alice never told her childhood sweetheart Leo that she swapped their relationship for a life of polyamory. She's now ready to reveal the truth - how will he react and could there be an exciting new future for them? Nas is desperate to win back his ex Vent, but will his jealousy get the better of him once again? Fatima wants to explain why she ghosted her ex Alan and see if there's a possibility of a second chance. Can he forgive her and agree to a fresh start?

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race Down Under
programme.desc: RuPaul and fellow judges Michelle Visage and Rhys Nicholson set Australia and New Zealand's aspiring superstars a special sewing challenge, testing their ability to create spectacular costumes from scratch

programme.title: I Can See Your Voice
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness hosts the mystery singing game show, in which contestants aided by a celebrity panel must spot good singers without hearing them. Regular celebrity investigators Jimmy Carr, Alison Hammond and Amanda Holden are joined by guest Alexandra Burke, as they assist two brothers from Middlesbrough in picking out the best singers from a line-up that includes a scientist, a prison officer and an electrician

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Kym Marsh and Gethin Jones host the weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical chat and expert advice

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin is surprised to discover the high expense involved in buying a patch of grass in London, before heading off to Greater Manchester to look at a tenanted, terraced property that leaves a lot to be desired. Meanwhile, Martel Maxwell visits Cumbria to look round a two-bed semi with an interesting roof

programme.title: Fraud Squad
programme.desc: The investigators look into an IT support worker shamelessly helping himself to hospital computers and a gang illegally fly-tipping on an industrial scale

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: Emergency services rush to find a pregnant woman who has collapsed on a remote moor, and dash-cam footage captures the moment a driver falls asleep at the wheel

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles hosts from Lincolnshire Antiques and Home Show as experts Jonathan Pratt and Gary Pe assist the teams racing around the fair pursuing potential purchases for profit at auction. Eric also shares some top tips on collecting Clarice Cliff pottery

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Luca is on the hunt for Jonno, but he may not like what he finds. Al tries to mend the difficult relationship between a wildly different mother and son

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Over three rounds, contestants Dion, James, Marilyn and Penny vie to find the single 'unbeatable' answer and streak ahead of the rest to make the final where they can win a cash prize. General knowledge quiz, hosted by Jason Manford

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah visits Scotland, making her way to Dumfries & Galloway with a married couple from London who are seeking a life-changing move and have a £350,000 budget

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Harry and David Rich meet Liz, Geoff and their daughter Lois in Yate, Gloucestershire, where the hope is they can use a £4,500 budget to create a garden with a nautical theme in memory of Liz's father, who was known locally as ''The Pirate'

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The trip continues in Wiltshire for debutant Paul Martin and seasoned chum Raj Bisram, but a risky buy of antique jelly moulds causes an auction wobble for one expert

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Another mix of nationwide reports and live studio-based chat. With Alex Jones and Jermaine Jenas

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: With her shocked guests watching on, Kheerat tries to apologise but Sharon directs her fury toward her brother - she wants Zack to pack his bags and leave. A comment from Vi has Kim worrying that she's getting old before her time, so she promptly asks out a man out for dinner, and Jean implores Ruby to show Lily some love

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: The day arrives for Dom to overcome the traumas of the recent past by stepping up to consultant level. But how far is he willing to go to ensure his path to power? A desperate Kian may have to betray Fletch's trust to get what he wants, while Louis bears the brunt of Max's fear over her diagnosis

programme.title: For Love or Money
programme.desc: Kym Marsh and Ashley John-Baptiste investigate the case of a man in Scotland whose online girlfriend in Ghana has demanded thousands of pounds, but has never visited him

programme.title: The Pact
programme.desc: Nancy learns some disturbing news about Richard and confronts him, only to be rocked by his admission. Unsure how to remedy the situation, she's drawn closer to Fr Martin, and makes a rash decision. Cat and Tish try to get rid of Louie's stolen goods, while Louie struggles with the news about Arwel and faces a terrible dilemma. As the police make a significant breakthrough, Max tries to grill Anna on what she knows about Jack's death - putting their marriage on the line

programme.title: Spotlight
programme.desc: How a £1 deal for public land on the scenic Causeway Coast put an ardent unionist and a staunch republican on the same side of a planning fight. Conor Spackman investigates

programme.title: Glow Up: Britain's Next Make-Up Star
programme.desc: The MUAs enter the world of special effects, as they are tasked with recreating looks from the smash hit crime drama Peaky Blinders - working at a prestigious make-up academy with guest judge, Peaky's Bafta-winning head make-up designer Loz Scathio. This week's Creative Brief is based on the seven deadly sins, and while one artist's gruesome looks bring out sloth, envy and wrath in very imaginative ways, one MUA's literal interpretation of greed falls flat

programme.title: Bates Motel
programme.desc: Norma has a big mess to take care of on her arrival home, Norman agrees to seek help, and Dylan receives shocking news about Emma's health

programme.title: Bates Motel
programme.desc: Caleb and Dylan are confronted by a dangerous proposition, and Sheriff Romero decides to confront Norma

programme.desc: Catrìona the cat is giving birth to her new kittens today and the farmyard gang have to be very quiet – but they find this very tiresome

programme.title: Su Shiusaidh (Little Suzy's Zoo)
programme.desc: Witzy and Boof decide to put on a shadow show, but they end up scaring their friends

programme.title: Su Pic (Peek Zoo)
programme.desc: Wiskerwitz the lion is miserable and has lost his roar. Fortunately, Vivienne, Seumas and Pìc are onhand to assist him

programme.title: Baile Mhuilinn
programme.desc: Gaelic songs and stories for children learning to read, featuring the letter F

programme.title: Piseag & Cuilean/Kit & Pup
programme.desc: The duo learns about things being full and empty by filling objects from the paddling pool

programme.title: Piseag & Cuilean/Kit & Pup
programme.desc: The duo learns about cardboard while stacking boxes, and a young scientist builds a bridge out of card to test its strength

programme.title: Stòiridh
programme.desc: Mischa MacPherson reads Tha Tàlant aig Muile-mhàg, written and illustrated by Richard Smythe and translated into Gaelic by Donald John Macleod

programme.title: Na Moomins/Moomin Valley
programme.desc: Mùmantrobha is left home alone for the first time and is very nervous about it

programme.title: Port Pàipeir
programme.desc: Bobbie Jock returns to Paper Port for a skateboard show. Matilda and her friends enter his dressing room and discover his talent is just the product of robotic shoes

programme.title: Saidheans Sporsail (Backyard Science)
programme.desc: Experiments include creating prehistoric-themed plants and making a sugar cube snow cave. Presented by Kerry Anne MacLeod and Allan MacDonald

programme.title: Kerry is Kirsty
programme.desc: Sisters Kerry and Kirsty MacPhee cycle the nation's favourite cycle routes. Starting in Portree they take the coastal road through North Skye's Trotternish peninsula, passing by the craggy sight of the OId Man of Storr to reach the Quiraing

programme.title: Speaking Our Language
programme.desc: An opportunity to learn Gaelic. Presented by Rhoda MacDonald

programme.title: Earrann Eachdraidh (History Shorts)
programme.desc: Fun sports, such as water skiing and polo

programme.title: An Là (News)
programme.desc: Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA

programme.title: Thar na Loidhne/Crossing the Line
programme.desc: A rugby-loving family who have introduced the game to their own community and the Stornoway ladies embarking on a journey

programme.title: Trusadh (Compelling Stories)
programme.desc: A look at the remarkable work of world-renowned genealogist Bill Lawson from Harris. The wealth of his work over the years includes local village and crofting histories

programme.title: Julie Fowlis: Ceol Aig Baile
programme.desc: Filmed during lockdown, Julie Fowlis presents the music series, offering musicians an opportunity to perform directly from their homes to viewing fans

programme.title: Tormod - Na Bheachd Fhèin (Norman - In His Own Words)
programme.desc: In a unique interview recorded to mark his 50 years in showbusiness, Norman MacLean looks back at his life in a frank and candid way - with that trademark wit to the fore, and spark very much still in his eyes

programme.title: Air Iomall-Music from the Edge
programme.desc: Two of Scotland's leading young traditional musicians, Charlie Grey and Joseph Peach, take a musical voyage on the Dutch vessel Wylde Swan to some of the most remote islands off Scotland's north-west coast

programme.title: Peataichean/Pets
programme.desc: Eilidh Cormack is joined by Sally and Helen and their rabbits, Jasper and Delilah

programme.title: Sionnach agus Maigheach (Fox & Hare)

programme.title: Shane an Chef

programme.desc: Although Gibidh is quick to complain about others, a pleasant surprise awaits

programme.title: Abadas

programme.title: Stòiridh

programme.title: Ronia, Nighean a' Mheirlich/Ronja, the Robber's Daughter
programme.desc: Autumn is here and Ronia and Biorc are worried about winter, which is not far away. Mata appears, offering a home for them

programme.title: Clann Na Cruinne
programme.desc: Through her artwork, Maria attempts to convey an important message about ocean pollution

programme.title: Donnie Murdo (Danger Mouse)

programme.title: Fuine (Home Baking)

programme.title: Earrann Eachdraidh (History Shorts)

programme.title: Dreach Ùr
programme.desc: Modernising a unit using bright paint and other colourful ideas, with Shona Masson

programme.title: Talamh gu Truinnsear
programme.desc: Following gardener Heather Dewar over a year of planting, weeding and cooking. Against the backdrop of the stunning Islay countryside, she shares her horticultural knowledge and favourite recipes. In the first of two programmes, she focuses on spring and summer produce

programme.title: Trusadh (Compelling Stories)
programme.desc: A look at the remarkable work of world-renowned genealogist Bill Lawson from Harris. The wealth of his work over the years includes local village and crofting histories

programme.title: Machair
programme.desc: Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis

programme.title: Alleluia
programme.desc: Iain MacKinnon presents hymns, psalms and readings to commemorate the life of Saint Columba.Amongst the singers are Mary Ann Kennedy and Eilidh Cormack

programme.desc: Thinking he's on an Arctic expedition while actually at the beach, Magoo mistakes Fizz for a monkey, definitive evidence of global warming.

programme.title: Mighty Mike
programme.desc: The Mikkelsens have pizza and the raccoons will do anything to get it. Can Mike hold them off for long enough for his owners to enjoy their dinner?

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: When Irma's scout master is disabled, Mr Bean steps in to take care of Irma and her scouts. Chaotic cartoon capers following the further adventures of the popular halfwit immortalised in the live-action TV series and Hollywood film. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean inadvertently becomes a teacher for a class of unruly pupils. Chaotic cartoon capers following the further adventures of the popular halfwit immortalised in the live-action TV series and Hollywood films. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: Team Tennyson visits the monuments of Chichen Itza in Mexico.

programme.title: NinjaGo: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Four ninja warriors battle dark Lord Garmadon and his skeleton army

programme.title: NinjaGo: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Four ninja warriors battle dark Lord Garmadon and his skeleton army

programme.title: Martin & Roman's Weekend Best!
programme.desc: Sarah Hadland, Stephen Tompkinson and Wes Nelson join Martin and Roman Kemp for more celebrity chat, music and comedy, as well as games and light-hearted challenges in the which the father-and-son duo go up against their guests

programme.title: Australia with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: Julia continues her 12,000km journey across the continent in Central Australia, a huge outback region of the Northern Territory also known as the Red Centre. She begins in the town of Alice Springs, where she is persuaded to take part in a dry boat race. She also heads back to the classroom at the world's largest school, meets a retired Aussie soap star at his desert home and takes a camel ride to the sacred site of Uluru, or Ayers Rock

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh heads to Swindon to surprise Lorraine, a retired RAF servicewoman and devoted charity volunteer. Because of a spinal injury, Lorraine struggles with mobility issues and lives with her full-time support team - Leonbergers Poppy and Doris. Poppy is a retired therapy dog and Doris is Lorraine's assistance dog, and helps with chores such as laundry and fetching household items. The team creates a fabulous low-maintenance garden as a calming retreat for both Lorraine and her canine family

programme.title: Alan Titchmarsh: Spring into Summer
programme.desc: Michael Ball joins Alan to talks about his return to the West End Stage and his forthcoming album. Plus, advice on how to make a garden into a nocturnal wildlife haven, and there is a sheep-shearing masterclass

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John Torode and Lisa Faulkner have advice on baking, including a classic coffee and walnut cake, a traybake featuring fish, potatoes and croutons, and strawberry shortcake crunch

programme.title: Game of Talents
programme.desc: Vernon Kay hosts the game show, with two contestants pairing up with Mel B and Michelle Visage to try to win big money by uncovering the secret talents of a range of mystery performers. With a knife thrower, a saxophonist and even a globe-of-death rider in the mix, the teams will have their work cut out

programme.title: Australian Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: Rebecca Maddern, Ben Fordham and Freddie Flintoff present the Down Under version of the show in which contestants take on a formidable assault course in Melbourne, with obstacles including the Floating Steps, the Swing Surfer, the Tuning Forks, Rolling Steel, Spinball Wizard and the Double Warped Walls

programme.title: In for a Penny
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern heads to Blackpool for the game show in which he travels around the UK setting members of the public unusual challenges, giving them the chance to win anything from the price of their petrol to £1,000 in the final game.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The murder of a journalist has chilling echoes of a 1960s horror film starring Midsomer's own Stella Harris. When the actress's more famous sister Diana returns after a 40-year family rift, the body count rises, with each crime reminiscent of a movie plot - giving Barnaby and Jones what looks like a disturbing case of life imitating art. Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes star, with Harriet Walter and Sinead Cusack

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Patrick Baladi, Vicky Williamson, John Craven and Kevin Eldon pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald (2018)
programme.desc: IIn 1927, the Magical Congress of the United States of America transfers the dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald to Europe to stand trial, but he escapes. In an attempt to scupper the evil sorcerer's plans of raising pure-blood wizards to rule over all non-magical beings, Albus Dumbledore enlists his former student Newt Scamander to help. Second part of JK Rowling's Harry Potter prequel saga, starring Eddie Redmayne, Johnny Depp, Katherine Waterston and Jude Law

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean: Havana to Haiti
programme.desc: Part one of two. The actress travels across two of the most enigmatic countries in the Caribbean - Cuba and Haiti - to explore, uncover and share the hidden gems they have to offer. Joanna kicks off her adventure in a Havana boxing gym with one of Cuba's rising female boxing stars. She visits the stars of the cabaret at the National Hotel that pre-dates the revolution, and entertains the cigar workers while they roll cigars in their factory. She visits the small town of Hershey, built on the success of the sugar industry, and visits the tomb of Che Guevara before heading off to Hemingway's favourite beach

programme.title: European Cup Winners: The British Pioneers
programme.desc: A look back at the early achievements of British clubs in Europe, including Celtic's European Cup triumph in 1967, and Manchester United's victory the following year, which came a decade after the Munich air disaster

programme.title: FYI Extra
programme.desc: Short bulletin rounding up the day's showbusiness stories

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.desc: Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features

programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions

programme.desc: Celebrity interviews and studio discussion from a female perspective

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and the experts are in Bradford, where Tim Hogarth has his eye on a silver sculpture of a stag and Michael Hogben's finds include a wooden portrait and a gold pocket watch

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts the quiz, with five friends who go fishing together answering questions about top 10 lists then trying to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. programme.title: The Chase

They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Aaron tries to track Liv down. Sam and Samson are shaken. Lydia is heartbroken

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Nick takes a risk by returning home to look for Sam. Emma meets a handsome stranger. Tyrone feels the strain of supporting two households

programme.title: Alan Titchmarsh: Spring into Summer
programme.desc: Broadcaster Clare Balding joins Alan at Manor Farm to talk about her new book Fall Off, Get Back On, Keep Going. Plus, there is a report on a champion racehorse and its foal, while Camilla Bassett-Smith is back in her cottage garden.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Nick is threatened by one of Harvey's thugs. Evelyn is furious to discover that Dev has given Tyrone a job doing deliveries. Emma suggests to Steve they could do some fundraising together

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Born Without Trace
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell return with more stories of people who were abandoned as babies, helping them try to find their birth families and know their identities. In the first edition, they examine whether two baby girls abandoned in Chesterfield in the late 1980s could be related? Through DNA, the team makes a shocking new discovery.

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: It'll Be Alright on the Night
programme.desc: Compilation of TV clangers, gaffes and fluffed cues, all rescued from the cutting-room floor to delight the nation

programme.title: Cheat
programme.desc: University lecturer Dr Leah Dale has always prided herself on her academic integrity, so when final-year student Rose Vaughan submits a suspiciously top-grade essay, Leah is quick to call her out. But there's more going on than meets the eye as Rose takes the challenge as a personal affront, and what begins as a seemingly open-and-shut case of academic deception soon spirals out of control. Drama, starring Katherine Kelly and Molly Windsor

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley

programme.title: FYI Extra
programme.desc: Short bulletin rounding up the day's showbusiness stories

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Adil Ray hosts as three pairs of contestants call upon their powers of deduction in a battle of words, with the last remaining duo given the chance to double their winnings or leave with nothing. Playing today are Astrid and her partner Alan, husband and wife Peter and Anna, and twin sisters Megan and Lizzie

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson presents the show from the Devonshire Dome in Buxton, where finds brought in for auction include the death mask of romantic poet John Keats, an unusual corkscrew, and an art deco diamond watch

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five called Young's Offenders answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge. Then they try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Andy, Heather, Ahmed and Nichola pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Things escalate at the Dingles', Liv watches a heartfelt message, and Ben wants to help Aaron

programme.title: Ainsley's Mediterranean Cookbook
programme.desc: Ainsley continues to explore the glorious Mediterranean region of southern Spain, making his way to the gastronomic hotspot that is Granada. Here, he learns all about the famous Alhambra Palace and samples a sweet local delicacy, piononos, with tour guide Katia. Later, he has a lesson in Flamenco dancing, before rustling up a classic seafood paella

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the big-prize quiz in which another line-up of contestants answer questions that could change their lives - with the lifelines Ask the Audience, Phone a Friend, 50-50 and Ask the Host available to them if they get stuck

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Born Without Trace
programme.desc: Time is running out for one foundling who was discovered on a luggage rack in Paddington station nearly 75 years ago, while another woman hopes DNA will solve the mystery of why she was left next to a church in Liverpool at two days old. Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: On Assignment
programme.desc: Lucrezia Millarini travels to the Spanish island of Ibiza to find out how they might be able to welcome back British tourists this summer. Steve Scott travels to Qatar to see why the falcon continues to be the most highly prized and looked-after bird in the Gulf. Plus, Rageh Omaar is in Montenegro, home to some of Europe's last free-flowing bodies of water, to find out if small hydropower plants that promise cleaner energy also be polluting the pristine waterways of this Balkan state

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. In 2019, the airport is having its busiest year to date, and are expecting more than 81 million passengers to fly in and out of the terminals, with its 76,000 staff ready to take on whatever is thrown at them

programme.title: Cheat
programme.desc: With relations becoming increasingly hostile, Leah resorts to more extreme measures to expose Rose, and as tensions flare between Leah and Adam, could it be that her husband is taking Rose's side? Later, Rose seems to pursue a more personal retaliation against Leah, but who is telling the truth? Katherine Kelly, Molly Windsor and Tom Goodman-Hill star

programme.desc: Short bulletin rounding up the day's showbusiness stories

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Omid Djalili host the quiz in which nine contestants - Byron, Melanie, Harry, Sarah, Louise, Eddie, Simon, Naoise and James - are each assigned a number between one and nine, with the four that make the final trying to win the jackpot defined by those numbers. Each player's number is also the total of questions they must answer correctly in the final game against the clock

programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Patrick Baladi, Vicky Williamson, John Craven and Kevin Eldon pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald (2018)
programme.desc: IIn 1927, the Magical Congress of the United States of America transfers the dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald to Europe to stand trial, but he escapes. In an attempt to scupper the evil sorcerer's plans of raising pure-blood wizards to rule over all non-magical beings, Albus Dumbledore enlists his former student Newt Scamander to help. Second part of JK Rowling's Harry Potter prequel saga, starring Eddie Redmayne, Johnny Depp, Katherine Waterston and Jude Law

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean: Havana to Haiti
programme.desc: Part one of two. The actress travels across two of the most enigmatic countries in the Caribbean - Cuba and Haiti - to explore, uncover and share the hidden gems they have to offer. Joanna kicks off her adventure in a Havana boxing gym with one of Cuba's rising female boxing stars. She visits the stars of the cabaret at the National Hotel that pre-dates the revolution, and entertains the cigar workers while they roll cigars in their factory. She visits the small town of Hershey, built on the success of the sugar industry, and visits the tomb of Che Guevara before heading off to Hemingway's favourite beach

programme.title: European Cup Winners: The British Pioneers
programme.desc: A look back at the early achievements of British clubs in Europe, including Celtic's European Cup triumph in 1967, and Manchester United's victory the following year, which came a decade after the Munich air disaster

programme.desc: Lucrezia Millarini travels to the Spanish island of Ibiza to find out how they might be able to welcome back British tourists this summer. Steve Scott travels to Qatar to see why the falcon continues to be the most highly prized and looked-after bird in the Gulf. Plus, Rageh Omaar is in Montenegro, home to some of Europe's last free-flowing bodies of water, to find out if small hydropower plants that promise cleaner energy also be polluting the pristine waterways of this Balkan state

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. In 2019, the airport is having its busiest year to date, and are expecting more than 81 million passengers to fly in and out of the terminals, with its 76,000 staff ready to take on whatever is thrown at them

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George celebrates his 24th wedding anniversary by presenting Mildred with a carriage clock. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Omnibus. Aaron pleads with Liv to reach out to Vinny. Jamie's suspicious. Ethan makes a decision

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A policeman's murder gives Wycliffe plenty to think about - especially as the chief suspect is a fellow officer who has been having an affair with the victim's wife. Adding to the pressure, senior figures within the force want the matter cleared up as quickly as possible to avoid a scandal. Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters star

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: An anonymous enemy goes all out to ruin Wycliffe by sending the police a batch of photos apparently showing him taking bribes. As soon as she hears the news, Lane puts an investigation into the deaths of two drug-dealers on hold and leaps to her boss's defence - risking her career in the process. Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster teams up with a dashing man to investigate a series of poison-pen letters in the sleepy village of Lymstock. Two of the missives have led to the deaths of Mona Symmington, the wife of Lymstock solicitor Richard, and Agnes Woddell, the parlour maid at the Symmingtons' house. However, Miss Marple suspects there is more to these deaths than meets the eye. Murder mystery with an all-star cast, featuring Geraldine McEwan, James D'Arcy, Emilia Fox, Imogen Stubbs, Ken Russell, Harry Enfield and Kelly Brook

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A woman's body is pulled from the river, reminding Frost that he investigated the death of her husband's first wife years ago. Unfortunately, it turns out that a key witness's statement went astray during the earlier case - which leads to Frost being suspended from duty. Discreetly continuing his enquiries, he is intrigued to learn the local priest recently heard a very disturbing confession. Starring David Jason, Eoin McCarthy, Anthony Calf, Kenneth Cope and Isla Blair

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A guest at a village Halloween party boasts of having witnessed a murder years previously - and later meets a grisly end in keeping with the macabre spirit of the occasion. Arriving to investigate, Poirot delves back into the annals of local life - and uncovers a series of mysterious deaths, any one of which could have a bearing on the present case. David Suchet, Amelia Bullmore and Zoe Wanamaker star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: In Dover, Lieutenant Colin Race is investigating the deaths of two Navy personnel when a distraught Sheila Webb runs out of 19 Wilbraham Crescent and into his arms. Inside the house, Colin finds the body of a murder victim surrounded by stopped clocks. Mystery, starring David Suchet, Anna Massey, Jaime Winstone, Lesley Sharp, Phil Daniels, Geoffrey Palmer and Tessa Peake-Jones

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the discovery of an unidentified teenage boy's body in a coastal town's shipyard, who is revealed to be listed as a missing person, having absconded from the care of his support worker. Vera discovers that the quiet community where he was found is plagued by a serious drugs problem - despite the fact that the only known dealer in the area has turned his back on crime. The victim could be the answer to the mystery, but a wall of silence surrounds his death. Mark Addy guest stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An American businessman fears his life is in danger while travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris, and offers fellow passenger Poirot $10,000 for protection. After rejecting the proposal, the sleuth wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow in Serbia. Racing against time to find the killer among the passengers, Poirot must look to the past to solve the crime, and is faced with a decision that will haunt him for ever. David Suchet takes the title role in the murder mystery, with guest stars Hugh Bonneville, David Morrissey and Eileen Atkins

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A blizzard forces the sleuthing spinster to spend a night in isolated Sittaford House, situated on a Devon moor. programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth falls asleep during a flight from Paris to London, while a female passenger is murdered by a poisoned dart, leaving few clues to the killer's identity. Poirot soon discovers she was a money-lender, which may provide a motive for the killing. The investigation is turned on its head, however, when the victim's illegitimate daughter comes forward to claim the inheritance. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with David Firth, Jenny Downham and John Bleasdale

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The successful businesswoman behind an empire of beauty salons throws a lavish party on board a boat on the River Tyne - only for her sister to be found dead in the water. Vera's investigation uncovers the possibility that the victim may have been in an abusive relationship - but may also have been about to bring a terrible secret to light that threatened her entire family

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: As the Second World War continues to rage, Foyle investigates a pro-Hitler organisation he suspects may be linked to a mysterious death at the White Feather Hotel, while reluctant assistant Milner struggles to decide where his loyalties lie. Crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen and Anthony Howell, with Charles Dance and Maggie Steed

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack is asked to investigate the theft of a car belonging to a friend of Mullett, but misjudges the grizzled Superintendent's capacity for tact and diplomacy and it is not long before he is taken off the case. programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Judy tries to locate Gary, but no one knows where he is. Kevin demands Sally tells him what he has done wrong. Fred tries to get close to Audrey by volunteering for her campaign

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des tackles Samantha about her lies about Natalie. Judy tells Jim that Gary has walked out on her. Greg offers to listen to Sally's marriage problems

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Millionaire's wife Mary Pritchard, a notoriously demanding invalid, apparently dies of shock in her locked room when the geranium in her wallpaper turns blue, fulfilling the dire warning of a mysterious fortune teller. The manner of her death creates a sensation in the tense village community of Little Ambrose, but although the woman's husband confesses to the crime, Miss Marple uncovers new evidence that could affect the court hearing's outcome and races to halt proceedings before the wrong person is convicted. Starring Julia McKenzie, with Toby Stephens, Sharon Small, Patrick Baladi, Caroline Catz, Claire Rushbrook and Donald Sinden

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: When the sleuth's dentist is found dead just minutes after he leaves his surgery, Chief Inspector Japp believes it to be suicide - but Poirot has reason to think otherwise and embarks on his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Tommy Hicks of the Midsomer Yeomanry finally has his name added to the Midsomer Parva war memorial, though he was shot for cowardice at the Somme in the First World War. It becomes apparent that time has not healed the rift between his descendants and the residents of Hammond Hall, whose patriarch Duggie Hammond pulled the trigger on his comrade all those years ago. A drink-fuelled mock trial of retired colonel Henry Hammond leads to a killing, and Tom Barnaby has to unravel the tangle of bitterness linking property developer Dave Hicks's brood with their neighbours. Drama, guest starring Donald Sinden and George Cole, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The unassuming detective launches an investigation when a conscientious objector dies while in police custody, and the judge who ordered his arrest is nearly killed in his booby-trapped home. His inquiries uncover a web of lies and corruption in the heart of wartime Hastings. Crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen and David Tennant

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Dour detective Jack Frost investigates a woman's near-fatal shooting. The victim was all set to testify against a notorious drugs baron accused of murdering one of his employees, but the appearance of a contract killer makes her think again - and it appears someone on Jack's team is leaking information. Meanwhile, the station is turned upside down in the hunt for a missing lottery ticket. David Jason, Michael McKell and Bruce Alexander star

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George seeks solace when his budgie dies, but Mildred is too preoccupied with finding something good enough to donate to the jumble sale. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George celebrates his 24th wedding anniversary by presenting Mildred with a carriage clock. However, he has purchased it cut-price from a dubious source, and when the Fourmiles return from holiday they find their home burgled, and among the missing items is a carriage clock. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Omnibus. Aaron pleads with Liv to reach out to Vinny. Jamie's suspicious. Ethan makes a decision

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A policeman's murder gives Wycliffe plenty to think about - especially as the chief suspect is a fellow officer who has been having an affair with the victim's wife. Adding to the pressure, senior figures within the force want the matter cleared up as quickly as possible to avoid a scandal. Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters star

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: An anonymous enemy goes all out to ruin Wycliffe by sending the police a batch of photos apparently showing him taking bribes. As soon as she hears the news, Lane puts an investigation into the deaths of two drug-dealers on hold and leaps to her boss's defence - risking her career in the process. Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster teams up with a dashing man to investigate a series of poison-pen letters in the sleepy village of Lymstock. Two of the missives have led to the deaths of Mona Symmington, the wife of Lymstock solicitor Richard, and Agnes Woddell, the parlour maid at the Symmingtons' house. However, Miss Marple suspects there is more to these deaths than meets the eye. Murder mystery with an all-star cast, featuring Geraldine McEwan, James D'Arcy, Emilia Fox, Imogen Stubbs, Ken Russell, Harry Enfield and Kelly Brook

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A woman's body is pulled from the river, reminding Frost that he investigated the death of her husband's first wife years ago. Unfortunately, it turns out that a key witness's statement went astray during the earlier case - which leads to Frost being suspended from duty. Discreetly continuing his enquiries, he is intrigued to learn the local priest recently heard a very disturbing confession. Starring David Jason, Eoin McCarthy, Anthony Calf, Kenneth Cope and Isla Blair

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A guest at a village Halloween party boasts of having witnessed a murder years previously - and later meets a grisly end in keeping with the macabre spirit of the occasion. Arriving to investigate, Poirot delves back into the annals of local life - and uncovers a series of mysterious deaths, any one of which could have a bearing on the present case. David Suchet, Amelia Bullmore and Zoe Wanamaker star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: In Dover, Lieutenant Colin Race is investigating the deaths of two Navy personnel when a distraught Sheila Webb runs out of 19 Wilbraham Crescent and into his arms. Inside the house, Colin finds the body of a murder victim surrounded by stopped clocks. Mystery, starring David Suchet, Anna Massey, Jaime Winstone, Lesley Sharp, Phil Daniels, Geoffrey Palmer and Tessa Peake-Jones

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the discovery of an unidentified teenage boy's body in a coastal town's shipyard, who is revealed to be listed as a missing person, having absconded from the care of his support worker. Vera discovers that the quiet community where he was found is plagued by a serious drugs problem - despite the fact that the only known dealer in the area has turned his back on crime. The victim could be the answer to the mystery, but a wall of silence surrounds his death. Mark Addy guest stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An American businessman fears his life is in danger while travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris, and offers fellow passenger Poirot $10,000 for protection. After rejecting the proposal, the sleuth wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow in Serbia. Racing against time to find the killer among the passengers, Poirot must look to the past to solve the crime, and is faced with a decision that will haunt him for ever. David Suchet takes the title role in the murder mystery, with guest stars Hugh Bonneville, David Morrissey and Eileen Atkins

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Omnibus. Ronnie enlists Jenny's help with Ed's surprise. Audrey minds Sam while Gail cleans Natasha's house. Daisy sets her sights on Sean's mate Carol

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: First episode of the drama, starring Michael Kitchen as a jaded police superintendent who would rather be fighting the enemy in France than crime on the south coast as the Second World War gathers pace in 1940. programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A governess takes up a new position, but feels constrained to consult Holmes about some of the bizarre conditions stipulated by her employer. Period crime drama, guest starring Natasha Richardson, Joss Ackland and Patience Collier, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An interpreter claims to have been abducted by two villains who forced him to interrogate a badly bruised and obviously distressed Greek captive unable to speak English. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look at a married couple that have made a booming business out of their hand-made Scotch eggs, and how a cotton mill-turned-soap factory is producing traditional bars, according to a process passed down through the generations. Plus, the team of craftsmen making the most accurate compasses in the world, and a behind-the-scenes look at the family firm making teddy bears that are cherished by children around the world

programme.title: The Sting (1973)
programme.desc: Two conmen decide to swindle a mobster out of a fortune in revenge for the murder of a mutual friend. Enlisting the help of a host of crooks, they quickly conjure up a brilliant scheme to make him pay for his crime. Oscar-winning Depression-era comedy drama, starring Robert Redford, Paul Newman, Robert Shaw, Charles Durning and Eileen Brennan

Drama, starring Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers
programme.desc: Recent reports suggest that the Ganges, the world's most revered river, is in trouble. Travelling to India, Jeremy's investigation takes him from crab-hunters in the delta to the heavily polluted middle river, and finally into the mountains in search of a rare predator

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade swims into the lair of a snakehead, an aggressive Far Eastern predator that has now invaded America. He tries to ascertain whether it deserves its reputation as a 'Jack the Ripper' fish capable of killing humans, and reveals that the creature is believed to breathe air and crawl on land

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: Goals from the stars of the 70s, 80s and 90s, including Kevin Keegan, Paul Gascoigne, Glenn Hoddle and Kenny Dalglish

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates the stories behind supposedly deadly freshwater creatures, beginning by examining whether piranhas deserve their fearsome reputation. He travels to Brazil to swim in the Amazon with the fish and incites them into a feeding frenzy, before tracking down survivors and eyewitnesses of attacks

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: The heroes try to stop a criminal organisation threatening to blow up London with a stolen nuclear bomb. Fantasy drama, with William Gaunt, Alexandra Bastedo and Stuart Damon

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A solicitor enlists Holmes to help clear him of murdering eccentric builder Jonas Oldacre, whose considerable personal fortune he stood to inherit. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett as the famed Victorian detective

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Two spies obtain information about a secret missile base intending to pass it to the other side via a person known as Captain Caruso, whom Steed and Mrs Peel are tasked to locate. Vintage adventure, with Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An old adversary of Doyle's stirs up rivalry between factions of political terrorist group the Organization as a diversion in order to launch a revenge attack on the CI5 operative, who he blames for the death of his brother. Action drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur and Terry fall under the spell of a bewitching Australian beauty who has ventured from Down Under in search of her missing fiance. However, she may just happen to be concealing an ulterior motive. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Intruders break into the offices of Nemesis and obtain sensitive information on Richard's background, placing his life in danger. Fantasy drama, starring William Gaunt, Alexandra Bastedo and Stuart Damon

programme.title: Fishing Allstars
programme.desc: Dean Macey and Adam Rooney visit three diverse venues across England. They first target barbel on the River Trent alongside Matt Godfrey, before switching their attention to carp on the Grand Union Canal, and finally teaming up with Tom Dove and Steve Ringer at Earlswood Lake

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A doctor visits Holmes on behalf of his friend and sponsor Blessington, a nervous invalid whose fragile peace of mind has been thrown into turmoil by a series of mysterious events. Drama, guest starring Patrick Newell and Nicholas Clay, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Ms Peel investigate the case of several businessman who have been killed by birds of prey - and discover a connection to a comic-book character

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle spring into action when East German agents blackmail a government employee into revealing secret plans for a new type of jet-engine tank. Featuring an appearance by playwright Lynda La Plante, alongside stars Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur gets his hands on the unreleased recording of a late, lamented pop star's final song, and decides to launch himself as a music-biz entrepreneur. Mel Smith guest stars, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Fishing Allstars
programme.desc: Dean Macey and Adam Rooney travel to Dorset with England international angler Matt Godfrey, where they target a 20lb carp on an overnight challenge, before trying their hand at sea fishing for wrasse at Portland Bill, and finally trying to catch a 5lb chub at Throop Fishery

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as impressionist Rory Bremner, weather reporter Laura Tobin, Dragons' Den's Deborah Meaden and TV gardener and chat show host Alan Titchmarsh pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: The team heads to Harvey Estuary in Western Australia to try and recover a 36-foot plywood vessel called Endeavour II that sunk in a wild storm. What appears to be a straightforward job on paper turns into an absolute nightmare. Job two is a charitable cause close to Luke's hear, as he and Jacinta team-up with men's mental health charity Squared Away to try and rescue a historic boat that is about to sink

programme.title: Never Say Never Again (1983)
programme.desc: James Bond investigates the hijacking of two American nuclear warheads and tracks the stolen missiles to the Bahamas, where a sinister millionaire working for criminal organisation Spectre is planning to hold the world to ransom. Action adventure, starring Sean Connery, Klaus Maria Brandauer, Kim Basinger, Max von Sydow and Barbara Carrera

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The sleuth investigates the case of a man who has acquired a well-paid but mysterious job - seemingly on account of his red hair. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and David Burke, with Eric Porter as Moriarty

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Emma visit the countryside to investigate rumours of a ghost seen in the private chapel of a long-dead duke supposedly killed in a mining disaster. Julian Glover guest stars

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: When a CIA agent dies after being thrown off a balcony, the unit sets up a fake arms deal with the German terrorist cell responsible. However, the gunrunners uncover the ploy, kidnap Bodie and transform him into a walking time-bomb. Lewis Collins stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's prestige as a pillar of the community is boosted by an invitation to address a meeting of his local Rotary Club - which is being held in the very hotel where Terry is acting as temporary house detective. However, a pair of thieves posing as priests and a mangeress equally as crooked as Arthur threaten to ruin his grand moment. Drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: The team heads to the seaside town of Rockingham in Western Australia to try and salvage a 34-foot yacht called the Renee Louise. It's run aground and the owner has gone AWOL. With a major tourist event kicking off in three days, the local council is desperate to get the vessel off the beach - it's an eyesore and it's dangerous. The team has two days to get the job done.

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Embarrassing Bodies presenter Christian Jessen, JB Gill of JLS, comedian Helen Lederer and former professional snooker player Stephen Hendry pit their wits against the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for their charity of choice. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of the opening round of the campaign, held at Ciudad del Motor de Aragon in Spain

programme.title: A View to a Kill (1985)
programme.desc: James Bond clashes with a megalomaniac international businessman plotting a global takeover of the computer industry by engineering a devastating earthquake in California's Silicon Valley - and killing millions in the process. Spy adventure, starring Roger Moore in his final appearance as 007 alongside Christopher Walken, Grace Jones, Tanya Roberts and Patrick Macnee
