programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A governess takes up a new position, but feels constrained to consult Holmes about some of the bizarre conditions stipulated by her employer. Period crime drama, guest starring Natasha Richardson, Joss Ackland and Patience Collier, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An interpreter claims to have been abducted by two villains who forced him to interrogate a badly bruised and obviously distressed Greek captive unable to speak English. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look at a married couple that have made a booming business out of their hand-made Scotch eggs, and how a cotton mill-turned-soap factory is producing traditional bars, according to a process passed down through the generations. Plus, the team of craftsmen making the most accurate compasses in the world, and a behind-the-scenes look at the family firm making teddy bears that are cherished by children around the world

programme.title: The Sting (1973)
programme.desc: Two conmen decide to swindle a mobster out of a fortune in revenge for the murder of a mutual friend. Enlisting the help of a host of crooks, they quickly conjure up a brilliant scheme to make him pay for his crime. Oscar-winning Depression-era comedy drama, starring Robert Redford, Paul Newman, Robert Shaw, Charles Durning and Eileen Brennan

programme.title: Cheers

programme.desc: Ray discovers the stone in Debra's engagement ring is a fake, and decides to get it changed without telling her - only to learn afterwards that she had beaten him to the punch and had her grandmother's $15,000 diamond put in. programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio station's new manager disagrees with everything Frasier says - and when the shrink objects to her ideas, he finds his show rescheduled at two o'clock in the morning. Comedy, guest starring Mercedes Ruehl, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles suggests he and Frasier set up practice together - but after a series of disasters, they end up in need of therapy themselves. Comedy, guest starring Milo O'Shea, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Cook Clever, Waste Less with Prue & Rupy
programme.desc: Prue Leith and Dr Rupy Aujla set out to transform the cooking and food shopping habits of four British families, offering inspiration to shake up their mealtimes and tackle their food waste. The first episode focuses on a couple from Bristol who are struggling to cope with their children's food allergies. Prue and Rupy design a time and money saving food plan that's gluten and dairy free, including recipes for an edible burrito bowl, a rich parsnip cake, and a smoothie that uses up banana skins

programme.title: The Year Britain Stopped
programme.desc: Documentary examining personal stories of Britain during lockdown. Other stories include the scientists and frontline workers striving to control the crisis, and a single mother whose son went missing during the first lockdown

programme.title: Gogglebox

Here We Go Again, Dung Dynasty, Running Wild with Bear Grylls, The Andrew Marr Show, and ITV News

programme.title: Catching Paedophiles: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Film exploring the challenges of investigating and prosecuting child sexual abuse, and how to manage predators when they've been caught. programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows more of Britain's most ambitious self-building projects, as intrepid individuals attempt to design and construct the home of their dreams. In this first edition, Kevin meets former army captain Justin, who has spent £1.8million on an abandoned neo-Gothic cemetery keeper's lodge and adjoining ex-council toilet block in south-west London. Justin's vision is to restore the lodge but demolish the ugly toilet blocks and replace them with an enormous luxury ground-floor extension, with an added moat and a giant basement with a swimming pool - all just metres from the nearest grave

With The Money Maker's help, the business could be ten times more successful, but only if they take his advice and act upon it quickly before potential competitors steal Trim-It's march. With no time to lose, Eric puts Darren under pressure to accept his investment, but will they agree on the best way forward?

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Bill Nighy narrates a journey that starts at Tirano and climbs up through the Italian Alps and lakes through into Switzerland, taking in the Landwasser Viaduct. At Disentis, the train track changes to a cog railway as the gradient gets steeper, and a much bigger engine is added to climb the steep mountain route. The journey then reaches its conclusion at Zermatt, sitting at the base of the majestic Matterhorn

programme.title: A&E: When Patients Attack

programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps Pat and Marita Harrold to renovate and extend the 1950s three-bedroom bungalow where Pat grew up and in which his mother still lives. The couple have moved house 17 times in the past 22 years, and hope to accommodate three generations of their family in the tiny, dark property. The architect plans to convert the original dwelling into a six-bed dormitory block with a new extension block offering living, dining and communal space - but the budget is under pressure and the clients express displeasure with the design

But will any of them fit the bill? Jo and Jan hold an auction to raise funds for their dog rescue shelter, and car salesman Duncan comes up with a radical plan to help his Costa del Sol dealership stay afloat

programme.desc: It's Christmas at Ravenseat Farm, and all nine children are home for the holidays, and this year, the family are busier than ever with a lot of calves to deliver. Fourteen-year-old Miles and his younger brother Sidney are asked to relocate their flock of hens, and work is piling up in the cowshed as Amanda's prize heifer Lily May is due to give birth to twin calves

programme.desc: Ben meets a Glaswegian retired teacher who relocated to the mountains of Ethiopia, and leads an active life in her new home as she approaches her 70th birthday. She has made significant contributions to the local community, including setting up a school and building a restaurant on an isolated mountain top over the course of three years

programme.title: The Sex Business

programme.title: Get Your Tatts Out: Kavos Ink

Georgia has fallen for her holiday company representative, so she decides to get his name permanently inked on her bottom. Fun-loving Madison asks for a bizarre design that mixes balloons with half a chicken, and Connor opts for a picture of a melon on his backside

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Great Scientists
programme.desc: Profile of 16th-century Italian astronomer Galileo Galilei, whose observations through a telescope of his own invention led him to defend the Copernican thesis that Earth orbited the sun instead of vice versa - a view that got him into trouble with the Inquisition. Presented by Allan Chapman

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property guru Ann Maurice tackles a bungalow in Hove that will not sell thanks to a lurid colour scheme that is scaring would-be buyers away

programme.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)
programme.desc: An ordinary man seeks solace from his mundane life by drifting into daydreams where he is a heroic figure. When he and a friend are faced with unemployment, he is propelled into a globetrotting adventure in real life. Comedy drama based on James Thurber's short story, directed by and starring Ben Stiller. With Kristen Wiig, Adam Scott and Shirley MacLaine

programme.title: The Book of Life (2014)
programme.desc: A man who longs to be a musician instead of a bullfighter like his father has to compete with a childhood friend when they fall for the same woman. Their love triangle catches the eye of the spirits of the dead, leading him on a journey through their bizarre world. Animated adventure, with the voices of Diego Luna, Zoe Saldana and Channing Tatum

programme.title: Teen Wolf (1985)
programme.desc: A teenage misfit is initially dismayed to learn he is a werewolf as a result of a hereditary curse. He finds there are advantages as he becomes a local celebrity, while his enhanced agility makes him the star player of his school's basketball team - but fame quickly goes to his head. Comedy, starring Michael J Fox, James Hampton and Susan Ursitti

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles (1959)
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson are asked to protect the last remaining member of the aristocratic Baskerville family, who is believed to be the target of a monstrous spectral hound roaming the remote Devon moors. Hammer version of Arthur Conan Doyle's mystery, starring Peter Cushing, Andre Morrell, Christopher Lee, John Le Mesurier and Miles Malleson

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness (2013)
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and the crew of the starship Enterprise are sent on a clandestine mission into enemy territory to track down the rogue Starfleet agent behind a terrorist attack on Earth. However, the assignment brings to light a hidden threat from within their own organisation. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: Starred Up (2013)
programme.desc: An inmate in a young offender's institution is transferred to an adult prison when he proves too violent to control. He is reunited with his father, who has spent most of his life behind bars, and comes to realise that his survival in this brutal new environment hinges on learning to control his rage. Drama, starring Jack O'Connell and Rupert Friend

programme.title: Sicilian Ghost Story (2017)
programme.desc: Luna, a 12-year-old girl who has fallen for her classmate, ventures deep into enchanted Sicilian forests to find him, unaware of how thick the mystery behind his strange disappearance is. Drama, starring Julia Jedlikowska, Gaetano Fernandez and Corinne Musallari

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: A series of half hour programmes aimed at reflecting the interests, needs and aspirations of the sign language community

programme.title: The Red Pony (1949)
programme.desc: A boy seeks solace from his feuding family through his friendships with his beloved pony and a ranch hand, whom he idolises. When the animal dies his relationship with his father seems to be damaged irreparably. Drama based on a short story by John Steinbeck, starring Robert Mitchum, Myrna Loy and Peter Miles

programme.title: The Black Tent (1956)
programme.desc: A wounded British Army captain is saved by a tribe of nomads in the Libyan desert during the Second World War, and they take him to their camp, where he is cared for by the sheikh's daughter and falls in love with her. Romantic drama, with Anthony Steel, Anna-Maria Sandri, Donald Sinden, Andre Morell and Donald Pleasence

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri (1954)
programme.desc: An American naval reserve pilot is called up for service in the Korean War, and must leave his family and civilian job as a lawyer. In command of a corps of naval pilots, he heads a bombing campaign on strategic Communist positions, but later comes to question the morality of the conflict. Adventure, starring William Holden, Grace Kelly, Fredric March and Mickey Rooney

programme.title: Donovan's Reef (1963)
programme.desc: An American soldier settles down with a friend and a kindly doctor on a South Sea island to relax in the aftermath of the Second World War. The arrival of the medic's snobbish daughter throws their idyllic life into turmoil, leaving them struggling to make her father seem respectable. Comedy drama directed by John Ford, starring John Wayne, Lee Marvin, Jack Warden, Elizabeth Allen and Cesar Romero

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee (1986)
programme.desc: A New York reporter searches the Australian Outback for a maverick hunter with a legendary reputation, and invites the adventurer back to America. But the die-hard Aussie needs to draw on all his survival skills to adjust to life in the urban jungle. Comedy adventure, written by and starring Paul Hogan, with Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Mark Blum

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond (2016)
programme.desc: The USS Enterprise sets out on a rescue mission which turns out to be a deadly trap set by a mysterious warlord. The crew are left stranded on an unexplored planet, and join forces with a fugitive alien scavenger to find a way off the hostile world and prevent a terrible weapon being unleashed upon the galaxy. Sci-fi adventure, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Idris Elba

programme.title: Crank 2: High Voltage (2009)
programme.desc: Hitman Chev Chelios sets off in pursuit of a Chinese mobster who has removed his heart and replaced it with a machine requiring regular jolts of electricity to keep it working. As he tries to locate his missing organ, he must resort to increasingly elaborate methods of obtaining the necessary voltage to stay alive. Action thriller sequel, starring Jason Statham, Amy Smart, Dwight Yoakam and Efren Ramirez

programme.title: Mahanagar (1963)
programme.desc: A housewife in 1960s Calcutta becomes a saleswoman to help support her family. The career enrages her old-fashioned in-laws, especially when she befriends an outspoken colleague and develops a more modern outlook on life, while her husband is plunged into depression after losing his job. Drama, starring Madhabi Mukherjee and Anil Chatterjee. In Bengali and English

programme.title: Two Thousand Women (1944)
programme.desc: Female prisoners struggle to cope with living in a German internment camp, but find common cause in making life difficult for their captors. When three British airmen are shot down over the prison, they keep them hidden from the Germans while plotting a way to smuggle them out safely. Second World War comedy, with Phyllis Calvert, Flora Robson, Patricia Roc and Renee Houston

programme.title: To Hell and Back (1955)
programme.desc: Biopic of actor Audie Murphy, following his service in the Second World War. Enlisting in the Army as a teenager to support his younger siblings, he excelled himself in action in the conflict in Europe and became one of America's most decorated soldiers. Starring Murphy as himself alongside Marshall Thompson, Charles Drake and Gregg Palmer

programme.title: Night Passage (1957)
programme.desc: The black sheep of a family falls in with a gang of outlaws plotting to rob a train operated by his strait-laced brother, but reckons without his sibling's determination to track him down and set him back on the straight and narrow. Western, starring James Stewart, Audie Murphy, Dan Duryea and Brandon de Wilde

programme.title: Dragoon Wells Massacre (1957)
programme.desc: A cavalry officer is assigned to escort a captured murderer to prison. However, the prisoner and his guard are compelled to join forces to survive when Apache warriors raid their wagon train as it moves across Arizona into hostile territory. Western, starring Barry Sullivan, Dennis O'Keefe, Mona Freeman and Katy Jurado

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II (1988)
programme.desc: The rugged Australian adventurer sets out to save his reporter girlfriend from New York drug dealers. Having rescued her from their clutches, he realises they will soon be coming after him - so he decides to even the odds by luring them to the Outback for a final showdown. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Paul Hogan, Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Charles S Dutton

programme.title: Snatched (2017)
programme.desc: After being dumped by her boyfriend before their holiday, Emily Middleton takes her cautious mother Linda with her to Ecuador. However, their lives are soon turned upside down when the pair are kidnapped. Fish-out-of-water comedy, starring Amy Schumer, Goldie Hawn and Joan Cusack

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter (2015)
programme.desc: A medieval warrior thwarts an evil witch queen's plan to wipe out the human race, but is cursed with immortality as a result. In the modern day, he continues to battle evil, and faces his greatest challenge when the sorceress is resurrected to resume her evil plan. Fantasy adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Elijah Wood, Rose Leslie and Michael Caine

programme.title: Charulata (1964)
programme.desc: A newspaper owner in 19th-century India feels guilty for neglecting his wife to focus on work, so asks his cousin to keep her company. They develop a close friendship over a shared love of poetry, but eventually fall in love with each other. Satyajit Ray's romantic drama, with Madhabi Mukherjee and Soumitra Chatterjee. In Bengali and English

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.desc: Pilot episode of the comedy following the exploits of young man Ben, whose life is turned upside down when he finds a baby girl has been left on his doorstep by an ex-girlfriend - and decides to raise his infant daughter with help from his friends and family. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Giuseppi's and Sante La Brea to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCool's from season one

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potter's stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny ask Howard and Bernadette for advice when they argue about money. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj try to find out whether they could survive a dark matter research expedition in a salt mine by attempting to simulate the conditions in a steam tunnel beneath the university. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is left in a difficult professional situation when a doctor (guest star Billy Bob Thornton) turns up at her door following her flirtatious sales technique, so the guys try to help her out. Meanwhile, Amy and Bernadette have a dispute over whether female scientists should flaunt their sexuality to try to get ahead at work. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon panics when Leonard announces he has to go into hospital for surgery, and the impending divorce of Raj's parents motivates Howard and Bernadette to work on their own marriage. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian (2009)
programme.desc: The living exhibits at New York's Museum of Natural History are shipped to Washington's Smithsonian Institution - along with the artefact that brought them to life in the first place. Nightwatchman Larry tries to retrieve it, only to find the contents of the world's largest museum have been reanimated, including a pharaoh determined to take over the world. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Amy Adams, Owen Wilson and Steve Coogan

programme.title: True Lies (1994)
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary computer salesman leads a double life as a secret agent battling international terrorism. His naive wife is unaware of his dual employment, and goes in search of adventure - only to end up in the clutches of terrorists who have stolen a nuclear weapon. James Cameron's action comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Jamie Lee Curtis and Tom Arnold

programme.title: Batwoman

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Alfie and rival owner Megan engage in a debate about breakfasts and heating, while David and Kevin become a little emotional before the week's winner is announced

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Documentary following the Countryfile presenter as he and his family come to the rescue his parents' farm in the Durham hills after his mother suffers an accident

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Matt calls in old family friend Richard and his heavy machinery to take on his biggest plan to date - a new road around the farm, hopefully making everything more accessible for his parents. The list of repairs keeps growing and Matt finds himself in a race against the rain to fix a hole in the roof of the new chicken barn, but the family get a welcome break from work when the puppies are born and Molly, Luke and Nicola get to meet the new arrivals for the first time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Wizards Thatch in Alderley Edge, a village in Cheshire. Owners Ian Lambert and his partner Ali Imiolek hope to cast a spell over the competition, but their guests end up picking out problems with the continental breakfast basket

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Blackpool, where James Reay and Simon Dooley run the one-star Winterbourne Hotel and Theatre Showbar. The contestants seem to be relaxed and impressed, but a rival's feedback sends one of the hosts storming out of the room

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Perfectionist Andrea Hickmott and her partner Nick Bonner-Williams welcome their guests to Northrise Lodge in Hastings, East Susses, but the rooms are criticised and deemed too clinical to relax in. Andrea also panics when she forgets to put sugar on the tables at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephanie and Dominic Parker (who would go on to find fame in Gogglebox) welcome the rest of the contestants to their B&B, the Salutation in Sandwich, Kent. However, an alcohol-fuelled evening of parlour games jeopardises the hosts' chances to win the prize

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. A wedding proposal appears to be on the cards, and the winner is announced

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man who is in cardiac arrest. They fight to keep him alive, while next door his wife hopes for a miracle on their wedding anniversary

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The wife, mother and daughters of a man who has been hit by a car wait for news from the doctors of whether he has suffered internal injuries, including a bleed on the brain. Other patients include a man who has cut off four of his toes mowing the lawn, and a three-year-old boy who has suffered a seizure

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 72-year-old is airlifted to St George's after being trampled by a herd of cows while walking her dog, and 13-year-old Tamzen has broken her leg at school trampoline practice. Meanwhile, 18-year-old art student Hermione has cut her hand on a glass at her part-time waitressing job

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Medical staff use battlefield dressings to try to save the life of a man who's bleeding to death. Nine-year-old Ar-Rayyan has been hit by a car and has a nasty head injury. And a fall leaves septuagenarian Bonnie with a severely fractured ankle

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man who is in cardiac arrest. They fight to keep him alive, while next door his wife hopes for a miracle on their wedding anniversary

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The wife, mother and daughters of a man who has been hit by a car wait for news from the doctors of whether he has suffered internal injuries, including a bleed on the brain. Other patients include a man who has cut off four of his toes mowing the lawn, and a three-year-old boy who has suffered a seizure

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 72-year-old is airlifted to St George's after being trampled by a herd of cows while walking her dog, and 13-year-old Tamzen has broken her leg at school trampoline practice. Meanwhile, 18-year-old art student Hermione has cut her hand on a glass at her part-time waitressing job

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priest offends Craggy Island's Chinese community and pulls out all the stops to convince them that he is not racist - but his efforts end in disaster. Sitcom, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon, Frank Kelly and Pauline McLynn, with Ozzie Yue

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates a potentially devastating by-product of Greek yoghurt production

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Software engineer Andy Forsyth and his partner Jacqui have three children between them and have decided the time is right to follow their dream and buy a second home on the Caribbean island of Barbados. Danni Menzies lines up five potential properties for them to choose between

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The programme heads to Lowestoft in Suffolk, where Henry Cole picks a valuable Lyons Tea enamel sign while Simon O'Brien converts a station trolley into a garden sofa

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team rummage through the hangar of a Vulcan bomber, where Henry finds a cockpit seat to restore, and Simon attempts to turn part of a jet engine into a coffee table

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: Investigating the case of a champion cat-breeder, and the grandsons of a Bristol man follow a trail that leads them to a secret about chemical weapons testing

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple race to open a shabby-chic B&B and restaurant in France, hoping their high-end food will go down a treat on their launch weekend. Elsewhere, two stargazers renovate a new observatory and a family running a bar on the Costa Blanca attempt to deal with a series of setbacks

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Brighton Surf hotel, where Jeremy and Elena Mann hope their hands-off hosting style will win the approval of their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Number 16, in Greenwich, London, owned by actor and antiques dealer, Robert Gray. Alas, Jan and Les find the dusty decor off-putting

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week comes from the Fleur de Lis in Sandwich, Kent, with hosts Jan and Les Fisher convinced their traditional place will impress the others

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to Dale End House near Matlock in the Peak District, where owner Sarah Summers is dreading the arrival of Robert after their confrontation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day sees the B&B owners meet for the last time, with the Brighton Surf Hotel's Jeremy and Elena Mann wanting to defend their no-breakfast remote-hosting concept

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The researchers investigate the life and work of a Glaswegian author who had lost all contact with his family, and take a trip to the home of a newspaper man from Norwich and uncover a previously unknown pension pay out of £30,000

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Young meerkat couple Beagle and Huskie become parents for the first time, and spider monkey Kiara is finding it increasingly difficult to bring up her first daughter, Laura. Meanwhile, vets decide to examine painted dog K'mana's ankle because of an old injury, leaving her partner Ville alone to cope with their seven adolescent puppies

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: New chateau owners Jayne and Steve need to get four en suite themed bedrooms ready for their new B&B business. For the Oriental suite, Jayne goes to visit Angel for help and advice. Plus, a chance to meet Brit Justin and his Aussie wife Annabelle, who are turning their chateau, with its sweeping views of the Pyrenees, into a family home

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Tom and Danielle Raffield, whose lifelong passion has been steam-bending wood. They've used the technique to create extraordinary furniture and lighting, but now plan to use it on a larger scale. In an attempt to escape the confines of their tiny gamekeeper's lodge, they have decided to build a wavy wooden house in South Cornwall, completed with curved cladding, twisted furniture and interior walls covered with weathered timber. With a £100,000 budget, the pair have decided to do a lot of the building themselves, and Kevin is on hand to discover whether they're up to the challenge

programme.title: World's Greatest Shipwrecks: History Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: Maritime archaeologists examine the wrecks of 74 First World War German battleships, which were scuttled off the coast of Scotland as the conflict drew to a close

programme.title: Titanic: A Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Examining whether the sinking of the Titanic was also the scene of a crime, investigating whether the SS Californian could have done more to help the lives of those onboard

programme.title: Sex Party Secrets
programme.desc: As the popularity of exclusive arranged orgies rises, this documentary explores the hidden world of the UK's self-proclaimed 'sexual elite', providing an insight into the lives of the most selective party planners and their meticulously vetted clients. As the guests sip champagne and fulfil their wildest fantasies behind the doors of multimillion-pound mansions and country estates, the programme explores the motivation behind the desire that drives married couples, young single friends and seasoned sex addicts to seek fleeting intimate experiences and group encounters with strangers

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Miles Jupp to go up against Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe in the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz. Sam Simmons joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition focuses on stories of triumph in the face of adversity. Nikkita, 27, is brought to A&E by ambulance after having a severe epileptic fit, and her dad Derry is by her side as doctors try to get to the root cause of her seizure. Phillip, 89, arrives after collapsing at home with chest pains, and doctors are concerned he is having a heart attack, while plumber Sebastian has sliced the tips of his fingers off at work. Documentary following life inside the A&E department of St George's in south-west London

programme.title: World's Greatest Shipwrecks: History Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: Maritime archaeologists examine the wrecks of 74 First World War German battleships, which were scuttled off the coast of Scotland as the conflict drew to a close

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of the team's favourite investigations, including Kate Quilton's visit to McVitie's in Carlisle to find out why so many biscuits have little holes all over them. Jimmy Doherty heads to Portugal to see how corks are made for wine bottles, while Matt Tebbutt is in Italy to learn why mascarpone is more expensive than other soft cheeses

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton heads to the Atlas Mountains in Morocco to uncover the secrets of saffron, revealing what makes it the most expensive spice in the world

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Andrew and Denise Holmes from Lancashire have been holidaying as a family in Florida for nearly 25 years. With the help of expert Laura Hamilton and a budget of £140,000 they set out to find their dream property in the Sunshine State

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole builds a steampunk lamp from a copper electric central heating pipe and Simon O'Brien modernises a dated Welsh dresser during visits to Whitby and Shipley in Yorkshire

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a military vehicle enthusiast, where Henry mirror polishes a decommissioned missile and Simon repurposes a tank turret

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: A company takes on the case of an ex-mayor of Wokingham, and uncovers his devotion to the local community. Plus, the story of a Jewish child's evacuation from Nazi Germany, and details of unclaimed estates where heirs are still to be found

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, the race is on to create a perfect shabby chic B&B before a big booking arrives, tensions rise in Spain as two bar owners work together for the very first time, and a pair of expats receive some early guest feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: A week of competitive holidaying begins in Betws-y-Coed, north Wales, where bikers Wayne and Tracy Dunn welcome their fellow hoteliers to Llwyn Onn Guest House

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second hosts of the week are newlywed hoteliers Jon and Chelli Bean from The Parkwood Hotel in Stockton-on-Tees

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third hosts of the week are Nicola Ellershaw and Mackenzie Griffey, who hope to impress with the stylish fare on offer at The Pug and Greyhound in Leicestershire

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests' final stay is at The Solar Strand Hotel in Crosskeys, Wales, where Gary Pesticcio and his daughter Naomi hope their hi-tech approach to hospitality will impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid, and the atmosphere turns sour when Jon and Chelli Bean disagree with Gary and Naomi Pesticcio's thoughts on their facility. Plus, Nicola Ellershaw and Mackenzie Griffey of The Pug and Greyhound in Great Glen want to unlock the reasons why their rooms were described as being 'like prison cells'

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: A firm traces heirs to the £500,000 estate of a burlesque dancer who performed at Soho's Windmill club throughout the Second World War, while another case uncovers a family's links to a comedy star's radio career. Plus, details of more unclaimed estates

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: A power struggle unfolds as young chimp Carlos challenges dominant male Dylan, and Asian short-clawed otter Wallace is struck down by a mystery illness. Meanwhile, bush dog Franco's pack has stopped growing after his most recent litter died, and keepers hope that moving one of the breeding females to another zoo might solve the problem

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick visits Stephanie to help get the original chateau pizza oven working, while Annabelle and Justin return from holiday to find their chateau infested with bees

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Michelle Parsons, an artist and teacher who decided to seize the day and build her own private hideaway in a woodland environment in Essex after she recovered from a serious illness. Together with her architect husband David, Michelle planned to construct a sleek, black-clad, three bedroom house complete with an art studio. However, torrential rain and a potentially disastrous gas leak stalled progress on the build, and as construction gets under way, Kevin wonders whether the couple's decision to eliminate windows on two sides of the property may leave them living in a gloomy bunker

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw travel to Devon to steal away one of the fastest road cars of its time, a 1997 Mitsubishi Evo 4, which dominated the World Rally circuits in the 1990s. The car that Fuzz and Tim are taking on belongs to 60-year-old Gary, a petrolhead who loved his Evo and used it as his daily driver

programme.title: Inside Bentley: A Great British Motor Car
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at the car company's plant in northwest England, as work commences on a new range of 4x4s. This is the first time cameras have had access to the plant, which is currently undergoing millions in new investment. The programme features the local people and master craftsmen working on the factory floor as well as visiting the world's most exclusive car showroom in Mayfair and the secretive department where customers can obtain the latest upgrades to their bespoke vehicle

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.desc: Behind the scenes of Neuschwanstein Castle in the Alps of southern Germany. Created for eccentric king Ludwig the second in the 19th century, the castle is both a visual and engineering marvel that was an influence on Walt Disney. programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visits the Black Country Living Museum in Dudley, where Geoffrey Munn examines a Faberge jewel, commissioned by the Countess of Dudley in 1903. Other artefacts brought in to be examined include a 3,000-year-old baby rattle, a typewriter used by Enid Blyton, a script with transcriptions by a young Laurence Olivier, and a tin of children's toys that was hidden up a chimney as part of a treasure hunt in 1940

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians explore the life of the South Devon branch line before the Beeching cuts of the 1960s. Peter Ginn joins a footplate crew and receives coal-shovelling tips from a veteran steam engine driver of 63 years' experience, and with Alex he learns about one of Scotland's most lucrative exports. Ruth Goodman finds out about the dangers involved in working on the Victorian railways, and how those who lost limbs were catered for by a dedicated prosthetics workshop. She also discovers how the railways came to the rescue when a deadly disease wiped out almost the entire stock of London cattle

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The team struggles to explain how a DAF 33 gearbox works, and office manager Sarah attempts to bring order to the auto memorabilia sale

programme.title: War Factories

programme.title: Adolf Hitler's War

How does press intrusion compares with the birth of Meghan's babies? Why have the royals moved from home to private hospitals? And what really happened at Meghan's baby shower?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Each year Mary Anderson likes to avoid the UK's cold winter months by spending her time in Naples in Florida, and now wishes to secure her own property in the region. Sara Damergi helps her identify suitable premises, which include a house with its own pool and a beach apartment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Languages graduate and vintage clothes collector Lola Oduba hosts the first dinner party in north London, convinced her flair for cooking and sophisticated tastes will ensure her victory. However, the guests are unimpressed with a retro menu of polenta, pork belly and rhubarb pudding

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-lover Francesca Sawyer hosts the second party in north London, but struggles to prepare her menu without the use of a cooker. Armed only with her three mini-ovens, she makes fruit-flavoured vodka jellies, poussin and cupcakes, in the hope this selection will be enough to win the day

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third dinner party in north London is hosted by DJ Niyi Adelakun. He has to deal with a shed full of chickens, a table made from a door, a fridge that doubles as a wardrobe, and a menu featuring too many courses

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Curtain-maker Joss Woolf holds the fourth dinner party in north London, but finds that her Thai menu receives a mixed response from her guests and the evening's entertainment brings out the worst in Lola. The host also gets a shock when Niyi admits to having a crush on her

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Boe Olaleye hosts the final dinner party in north London, hoping to impress with his meticulously prepared 'back to African roots' menu. At the end of the night, the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant which often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners' lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon Ramsay instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick and Arthur race to collect low-hanging fruit to make delicious redcurrant jelly. In south-west France, Donna and Paul are hard at work on their most ambitious project yet, creating a tea room. However, stringent building regulations add to the challenge. Elsewhere, Ithaca and Alex need to raise some cash to help repair their chateau's 300-year-old roof

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Ginny and Tony, who are searching for a property on the Mani Peninsula in Greece and have a budget of £230,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lancashire couple Donna and Terry have been working together in their own jewellery business for the past 15 years and have decided that now is the time to spend less time at work and more time in the sunshine. Laura Hamilton is to find them a dream holiday home in Manilva on the Costa del Sol, so with their budget of £135,000, lines up five homes for the pair to consider

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Excitable French bulldog Buddy arrives at the centre. His owners have tried selling him seven times but every time he has been rejected. Can the staff finally find him a forever home? An eight-year-old girl who always wanted a small dog has her mind changed when she sees stray labrador Leah, and nervous collie Kimmie needs another dog to keep her company

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Pastry chefs from hotels, restaurants and small businesses in Cardiff, Bristol, Norfolk, Brighton and London compete to be crowned best patisserie team in Britain. The teams face testing challenges judged by two world-class patisserie experts, Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden. For their first challenge, the teams must produce two different types of miniature classics - Tarte Piémontaise and the Jaffa Cake. They must make 24 perfect and identical items of each pastry in just three and a half hours

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two sets of househunters whose searches were all about family. Retired couple Tom and Sue are living in their motorhome having sold their beloved cottage in Tom's native Yorkshire. The plan is to move 150 miles south to be near Sue's grandson - and they long for an open-plan home with a huge garden. Meanwhile, doting father Charlie, who is recently divorced, and his two children would like a new family home in Kent to start a new chapter in their lives

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson take on Lee Mack and Katherine Ryan in the comedy words-and-numbers game, while Brett Domino joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Tom Allen's Quizness
programme.desc: Comedian Tom Allen hosts the hilarious quiz show in which contestants' general knowledge is put to the test for the chance to win £25,000. However, there's a twist - if they want to win it, the quizzers will need to prove their brains by looking daft. Here, Emma, Bernie, Gemma and Harv fight it out for a shot at the jackpot, facing tricky questions on anything from Christopher Columbus to Mr Tumnus

programme.title: The Great Garden Revolution
programme.desc: In an episode dedicated to kitchen gardens and growing vegetables, herbs and fruit, the team come to the aid of two chefs in Wakefield who need a hand getting started at growing their own produce. Poppy Okotcha demonstrates which vegetables grow well in the same plots, Joel Bird plants a bee highway and creates a mushroom log, and Bruce Kenneth builds a bespoke greenhouse made from upcycled stained glass. Plus, comedian Tom Allen gives a tour of his own garden space

programme.title: Hire My Home
programme.desc: Pilot episode for a new interior design show, in which Anna Campbell-Jones and Zeena Shah transform two tired holiday lets into dream staycation spots, then ask 100 potential; guests what they make of the results. The first episode takes them to Aberdeenshire, where they tackle a holiday rental attached to a 16th-century castle and a cottage on the banks of the River Deveron

programme.title: Beat the Chef
programme.desc: Amateur cook Filippo Adamo is keen to tantalise taste buds with his traditional creamy mushroom risotto. Chef Mark Sargeant aims to beat Filippo at his own game when they knock up some gnocchi. Andi Oliver hosts as the pair compete in the fast-paced cook-off

programme.desc: Drag act Wayne (aka Miss Levi) and his husband Des host a charity fun day for vulnerable mums and their children, with human hungry hippos and a high heel dash, in an effort to hit their target of 100,000 euros. Local heavy metal star Jonny Hellraiser tries to attract customers to his 1950s-style diner by introducing 'the world's biggest breakfast'. Business is hectic for wedding planner Louise, although she has not heard from her latest couple for weeks and has no idea how many guests are due

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Welsh couple Ben and Kate hope to achieve their dream of running a bar in the sun. They have just £30,000 to fund their entire move and are checking out five bars to rent. But will any of them fit the bill? Jo and Jan hold an auction to raise funds for their dog rescue shelter, and car salesman Duncan comes up with a radical plan to help his Costa del Sol dealership stay afloat

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: The programme follows Graham, a pest controller who battles critters, bugs and vermin across the Costa del Sol, as he goes on a snake hunt and is called to an ant infestation. Plus, a pair of Welsh ex-pats who moved to Spain to run a bar, and the so-called 'cat lady of the Costa del Sol', who feeds more than 100 street cats as well as taking them to the vets to be neutered

programme.desc: Cherry Healey hosts the show in which an expert team transform people's looks using only non-invasive cosmetic techniques. First up are community police officer Suzanne, whose confidence disappears once she takes off her uniform, and Tracey, who has lots of time to herself now that her children have left home. But when she looks in the mirror, she doesn't like what she sees

programme.title: Zara & Mike: No-Nonsense Royals
programme.desc: The Tindalls are on the surface an unlikely pairing of a Wakefield-born rugby union player and the daughter of the Princess Royal born and bred in a royal palace. This programme looks at their life together, from the highs to the lows, revealing how they carved out successful careers for themselves and supported each other along the way

programme.title: Fergie Vs Diana: Royal Wives at War
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the relationship between the two princesses. Their mothers had been schoolfriends, and they had known each other since adolescence, becoming close friends despite stories of intense rivalry. However, as both their marriages broke down, the strain took a toll on their relationship with each other

programme.title: The Murder of Sarah Payne: A Mother's Story
programme.desc: Documentary shedding light on the emotional fallout of the murder of Sarah Payne, the eight-year-old girl who was kidnapped and killed in Kingston Gorse, West Sussex in 2000. Two weeks after her disappearance, Sarah's body was found, and after a high-profile police investigation, Roy Whiting was convicted of her murder and sentenced to life imprisonment. Testimonies from friends, family, police officers, key witnesses and experts in criminology are combined with an interview with Sarah's mother, to illustrate the tragic toll the case took on those closest to the victim

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The psychology of Charles Manson, an American cult leader whose followers murdered seven people in their California homes over two nights in August 1969. Detectives, lawyers and psychiatrists analyse what prompted the crimes, and examine how Manson was able to persuade his acolytes to take the lives of innocent people

But with only his pension to live on, and his movable mansion in need of a refurb, will he have to sell up?

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: The bank holiday works schedule is disrupted when reports come in of a trespasser on the relief lines outside London, forcing the cancellation of all trains leaving Paddington station. However, the total shutdown allows the engineers onto the track to renew large sections of the ageing rail infrastructure. Meanwhile, transport police hunt for a bike thief at Bristol's Temple Meads station

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Yorkshire police forces tackling an ever-more sophisticated criminal fraternity from the cities to the Dales. Police from the north and west of the historic county crack down on drug-addled drivers, and it is North Yorkshire's Roads Policing Group that faces the toughest challenge when a convicted drug dealer leads officers on a 140mph chase on one of the UK's busiest motorways. Jamie Theakston narrates

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: West Yorkshire officers take action against a teenage driver after he leads them on a high-speed chase across Roundhay Park in Leeds, while the cops also face a battle to keep up with uninsured drivers who flout the law without fear of consequence

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: PC Damo Stevens takes on an aggressive arsonist intent on bringing Darlington to a standstill, while dog handler Andy Hunt is called to a violent domestic disturbance. Sgt Kev Salter is hot on the heels of a runaway quad bike and PC Paul Jackson uses advanced stop tactics to apprehend a gang of suspected thieves

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team are outnumbered and outmuscled when they stop a coach-load of cage fighters following an anonymous tip off that there may be drugs on board. A suspected wheel thief kicks off on the carriageway. When Interceptors Kev and Andy pull over a Peugeot, the occupants are in no mood to hang around. Finally, a drunk dices with death as he walks the wrong way up the middle of the busy A19

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Kev and Steve go on the hunt for suspected heroin dealers, while dog handler Liam attends the scene of a suspected arson attack. Damo deals with a drunk driver, and another man is so inebriated behind the steering wheel that he blows three-and-a-half times over the limit

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall tries to solve dog behavioural problems, using his experience to find quick but long-lasting solutions. He meets Allana, whose two Labradors Teddy and Fudge pull her along at break-neck speed when out walking. He then visits Peggy, a cross-breed with a penchant for escaping, no matter how much her owners try to keep her penned in. Finally, Graeme heads to Blackpool, where Stanley the terrier has been struggling ever since his best friend Sweep died

Steve and Gemma live in a newly renovated five-bedroom house in the seaside town of Redcar and own nearly 80 properties worth over £6 million, while Ben and Demi live in a rented two-bedroom, terraced house in Co Durham and rely on Ben's zero-hour contract work as a roofer

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint

Thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, Angelina Jolie, Giovanni Ribisi and Robert Duvall

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: Swindon control springs into action when an unexploded Second World War bomb is found near the line in Teignmouth, transport police seek a word with a man who jumped onto the track to retrieve something he dropped, and team leader Martyn reveals the high cost of cleaning up graffiti

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The officers deal with a number of uninsured drivers, including one who leads them on a 35-minute chase and another who flees the scene of a rush-hour crash, earning himself a full-scale investigation for his trouble. Then in Bradford, a crackdown on road offences leads to the officers nabbing another insurance avoider, but tensions run high as a result

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: It is estimated that more than a million vehicles in Britain are fitted with cloned number plates as criminals who switch them to pass by police cameras undetected. On the outskirts of Bradford, a suspected stolen car using cloned plates crashes after running a red light, leaving the occupants of another car with serious injuries, leaving officers to deal with the aftermath, while a manhunt is launched for the offenders

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Justin Moffitt and Paul Faulkner chase down a gang of suspected car thieves, while it takes seven officers to stop a violent thief who tries to sink his teeth into them. Elsewhere, a drug raid turns life-threatening, and dog-handler Jimmy Grieves tries to find out what has happened to a man with a bloodied face

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A special edition looking at the police dog teams in the Cleveland and Durham specialist operations unit. Cameras observe the highly trained animals and their handlers in training and in action as the documentary reveals the endearing bonds the hounds develop with their masters. Drawing on new stories as well as archive footage, this programme showcases the vital role the dog unit plays in collaring criminals within the region

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Pursued by a helicopter and a team of armed response vehicles, two men armed with machetes and a sawn-off shotgun make a dramatic escape on a motorbike. Meanwhile, officers Clarkie and Nick take two dangerous boy racers off the road, and a high-speed pursuit of alleged burglars turns into a race on foot

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall tries to help the owners of Bella the collie in Sheffield, whose aggression has become so extreme that people can no longer visit the house and the family cannot take the pet out in public. programme.desc: As the pipes, tunnels and waterways that lie beneath the world's cities start to crumble, sinkholes are appearing with no warning. Footage from instances around the world reveal how once-stable urban areas are sinking right in front of people's eyes

programme.title: Eaten By an Escalator
programme.desc: Documentary scrutinising people's darkest fears surrounding escalators by take a look at calamities involving the moving staircases and hearing from those who have been victims of accidents Plus, the programme debunks some myths and assesses the safety of these machines with industry experts in an attempt to allay widespread fears surrounding the dangers of escalators

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Shannon Matthews: What Happened Next
programme.desc: The disappearance of Shannon Matthews was a story that gripped and then appalled Britain. Nine years on, this documentary examines her kidnapping and why people close to the case believe the police should reopen their investigation. Featuring the insight of some of those closest to the case, the programme charts the impact on an innocent girl caught in the lies and greed of those who were supposed to be caring for her

programme.title: My Lover My Killer
programme.desc: Real life cases of people murdered by their own partners, beginning with a controlling taxi driver who reacted violently at the prospect of his relationship ending

programme.title: Murdered By
programme.desc: Documentary telling the stories of three women who have murdered their partners, featuring contributions from families, police officers, journalists and experts

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: The documentary looks at a hidden world of pensioners who are selling sex when most people of their age are planning their funerals. Those featured include Norm, an 85-year-old former priest now enjoying a new career as a porn star, and 72-year-old transgender escort Pippa Jane

programme.title: Robbing Your Relatives
programme.desc: Return of the documentary taking a look at what can happen when families fall out over money. The first episode examines the case of a teenager cheated out of her grandfather's inheritance by her own dad and stepmother. The pair forged signatures and lied to solicitors and banks to steal the money, then frittered it away on luxuries and paying off their own debts. There is also the story of a pair of identical twins who fell out over a £55,000 loan, and a man who was alleged to have robbed his mother's pension and life savings, but took his own life before justice was done

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall checks up on a 13 stone Newfoundland, whose health is in danger due to his weight - but who refuses to exercise unless he has been bribed with treats. Other pets on his list are a Great Dane with a social media following who makes his owners' lives unbearable and a dog so spoiled she even has her own car, but who has a serious dislike of children

programme.title: Columbo: Lovely but Lethal (1973)
programme.desc: A cosmetics company is rocked by the revelation that a pirated version of their latest product is on the market, and then, shortly afterwards, one of their chemists is found murdered. But when the shabby sleuth scrutinises the case, he suspects the events are linked to a rival company. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Vincent Price, Martin Sheen and Vera Miles

programme.title: Columbo: Mind Over Mayhem (1974)
programme.desc: A scientist is overjoyed when his son follows in his footsteps, receiving widespread acclaim for a revolutionary new theory. When a fellow boffin produces evidence of plagiarism, the ruthless father resorts to murder to save his son from a scandal. But he reckons without the dishevelled detective, who sees through his efforts to make the killing look like the work of burglars. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Jose Ferrer and Lew Ayres

programme.title: Columbo: Blueprint for Murder (1972)
programme.desc: An architect kills his business partner, and comes up with an elaborate scheme to make Columbo first suspect him, then reject him as the murderer. The villain begins by teasing the detective with hints on where he has hidden the body - hoping that when Columbo fails to find a corpse, he will look elsewhere for a killer. Crime drama, directed by and starring Peter Falk. With Patrick O'Neal and Janis Paige

programme.title: Columbo: Ransom for a Dead Man (1971)
programme.desc: A devious lawyer hatches the perfect murder plot - she kills her husband, tells the police he has been kidnapped and leaves the body at the ransom drop, making it look like the criminals who abducted him finished him off. However, the crumpled cop sees through her ruse and begins picking apart her story in his inimitable manner. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Lee Grant and Patricia Mattick

programme.title: Columbo: Last Salute to the Commodore (1976)
programme.desc: The owner of a shipbuilding business disapproves of his son's plans for the company, and announces his intention to sell up. However, that night, he is murdered and his body dumped at sea. The crumpled cop, joined by two sidekicks, becomes convinced the victim's son is responsible - but everything is not as it seems. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Vaughn, directed by Patrick McGoohan

programme.title: Columbo: Forgotten Lady (1975)
programme.desc: An agelong actress grows desperate to recapture her glory days and resorts to murdering her husband and making it look like suicide. She hopes the publicity will revive her flagging Broadway career, but she reckons without Columbo's uncanny ability to see through her devious performance. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Janet Leigh, Sam Safe and John Payne

programme.title: Columbo: A Bird in the Hand (1992)
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler with a mountain of debts comes up with a plan to make some easy money. He plants a bomb under his wealthy uncle's car in the hope of inheriting a large legacy - but a hit-and-run driver jeopardises the entire scheme and Columbo is soon sniffing around for clues. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Tyne Daly, Greg Evigan and Don S Davis

programme.title: Columbo: Publish or Perish (1974)
programme.desc: A ruthless publisher hires a hitman to kill a best-selling author who has threatened to sign with a rival company - but reckons without the involvement of the cigar-smoking sleuth, who is determined to put the culprit behind bars. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Mickey Spillane, Jack Cassidy and John Chandler

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU investigates a 'he-said, she-said' case when a woman crashes a wedding to accuse her therapist of sexual assault. Hard-hitting and emotional drama, directed by Lucy Liu and starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a pregnant teenager refuses to name the father of her baby, Benson and the SVU team investigate. Starring Mariska Hargitay, Kelli Giddish and Ice-T

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The discovery of an amphetamine-like drug that boosts concentration is found in a murder victim's car, leading the detectives to discover he was a referee in a high-stakes video-gaming tournament. They learn he had confiscated the illicit substance, providing them with a possible motive for the killing, but when they uncover the competition was rigged with a computer code, a host of potential suspects emerges. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The district attorney's office asks Jason for assistance in the prosecution of a fraternity, but his efforts to help are thwarted when the students close ranks to stonewall him

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A former celebrity client sues Jason after his advice on her custody battle backfired, and the subsequent confrontation sees him hiring an eccentric attorney to mount his defence

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces across the country to reveal how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions against shoplifters. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A female producer is intent on scuppering a project forged at a film festival, only to die in mysterious circumstances. Jessica investigates and soon brings the villain to book. Mystery, starring Angela Lansbury and Susan Blakely

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed while competing in a swimsuit contest, raising fears she may have fallen victim to a jealous rival, or even a stalker. Gibbs' investigation leads to the discovery that the victim was taking yoga classes - and this provides him with the breakthrough he needs to solve the case. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An officer is found dead, and evidence initially suggests she committed suicide as a result of a nervous breakdown. However, a sceptical Ducky believes foul play was involved - and the team later discovers the victim was caught up in a love triangle. Kevin Quigley guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The wife of a zealous defence lawyer is found dead in her car, but Briscoe and Green suspect the victim's husband was the real target, and set off on the trail of a former client - a convict who sent him threatening letters from jail. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a woman whose scantily clad body is found on the Upper East Side. Initially believing her to be a prostitute, they learn she was a doctor who had been handing out unauthorised doses of a powerful drug. The hunt for her killer leads the team into a web of deceit and blackmail, with a Russian mobster and his son seemingly pulling the strings

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis discover a man leading a secret double life when they investigate who opened fire on a group of people disembarking from a party cruise. A major dispute erupts when Schiff confronts the governor and attorney general over the decision to seek the death penalty. Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baseball star becomes the prime suspect in the murder of his limousine driver, who had been regularly supplying him with steroids. Briscoe and Green's investigation reveals blackmail as the underlying motive for the crime. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The charred body of an Asian girl is found outside the apartment of the Chinese consul general. Forensics discover she was murdered before her corpse was burned, prompting detectives to investigate rumours that the diplomat is somehow connected. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis trace a robbery suspect to a militia group, but McCoy is strangely affected by the leader's devotion to his cause - and begins to receive death threats once the case comes to court. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Marine is murdered, but it is not long before the prime suspect is also found dead. Tim and Abby discover a clue to both killings in an e-mail that suggests the victims were involved in a game with deadly consequences. Drama, starring Sean Murray and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Marine suspected of murdering a girl is killed in Iraq, and a search of his personal belongings reveals her body. Most members of the team believe they have found conclusive evidence of his guilt - but Gibbs suspects there is more to the situation than meets the eye

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony is infected with a deadly virus sent through the post by shadowy figures who demand the details of a long-closed case be made public in exchange for the antidote. McGee and Gibbs set out to identify the culprits and find a cure for the disease. Michael Weatherly and Mark Harmon star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Torres relies on his team's investigative skills after he awakens on a dilapidated fishing boat shirtless, disoriented and nursing a pounding headache. His discarded shirt is spattered with blood he is unable to remember any events of the previous 12 hours. Later, he finds the body of a young woman under his motorcycle. Wilmer Valderrama stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the death of an education adviser whose body has been found in the East River - a case apparently connected to a series of substantial gambling losses he had run up but was hiding from his wife. At first it appears to have been a suicide, but when it is revealed his body was covered in anti-seasickness patches to induce drowsiness, it becomes clear it was murder

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan investigates a series of murders, following a trail of clues that leads to a local foster mother - but accidentally shoots a fellow cop while pursuing a suspect. Realising his career is in jeopardy, Barek tries to get him off the hook, but the case proves difficult and emotive. Guest starring Whoopi Goldberg

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Parts of a dismembered body are discovered on four street corners, triggering an investigation that eventually leads Mac and the team to suspect Russian mobsters may be responsible. As the case proceeds, an explosion rips through the neighbourhood, indicating that some local men may be seeking to exact their own brand of rough justice. Crime drama, starring Eddie Cahill, Gary Sinise and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Jo and Lindsay investigate the murder of a successful Brooklyn-born businessman, and discover he insisted on maintaining connections with the housing project where he was raised. His wife's statement contains inconsistencies, raising suspicions about her private life - but as events unfold, it becomes clear that neighbourhood drug dealers are involved. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Sela Ward and Anna Belknap

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: One of Bull's college buddies is accused of murder on a Native American reservation, and the consultant realises the complexity of a tribal court is well beyond his comfort zone

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A small-town lawyer asks Jason to help him pursue a class action suit against his home's biggest employer, who has been blamed for an outbreak of a debilitating illness

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A former soldier comes to trial for the murder of a Yemeni immigrant he suspected of being a terrorist. With the events of September 11 still fresh in everyone's minds, McCoy tries to find a way of ensuring the jury's fears and prejudices do not influence their verdict. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal shooting of two professors, which occurred soon after one of the academics campaigned against the treatment of women in the Middle East. Their inquiries lead them to a Muslim with strong beliefs - and an extreme dislike of females. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pizza delivery man is murdered, causing trouble when the two suspects point the finger at the other. Though one of the pair is taped admitting to the crime, his Catholic priest uncle forbids the team from violating the sanctity of the Confessional. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-school student is killed by a hit-and-run driver, with tyre marks at the scene indicating it was deliberate. The case is complicated when the chief suspect is murdered by his mother. Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bookmaker is arrested on suspicion of murdering his business partner - and his attorney puts together an unconventional case that effectively turns the whole trial into a political statement. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Baltimore detectives Munch and Falsone head for pastures new, travelling to New York to aid the investigation into the death of a teenage model, while McCoy has a fight on his hands with the attorney representing the victim's parents. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Richard Belzer and Jon Seda, with Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team's old enemy Ari Haswari returns, working on behalf of a secretive terrorist faction. Gibbs is distressed to learn he is the next target, but does not realise the killer has another more complex scheme in mind. Guest starring Rudolf Martin, with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. The team reels in the wake of the terrorist attack, but tries to avenge Kate's death by collecting as much information as possible on Ari before he does any more damage. Meanwhile, Gibbs learns one of his old flames has been named as the new NCIS director

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gibbs continues to blame himself for Kate's death, and enlists Jenny's help to track down Ari - but they are nearly killed in a shoot-out. Just when all seems lost, however, Ziva is able to point the investigation in the right direction. Starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A police officer is framed for a triple homicide by a greedy woman involved in a bitter divorce settlement who has her sights set on revenge. It emerges she took advantage of his sleepwalking - a habit that began after he killed a man in self-defence a year earlier. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate when an outbreak of arson attacks on churches culminates in the death of a St Gerald's employee. The trail soon leads to a man who donated $100,000 for restoration work on the building. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate a troubled teenager after his parents are found murdered in their suburban home. They are convinced the youngster is innocent - even though he confesses to the crime. Meanwhile, Deakins spends his last two weeks on the job preparing for his future

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is seriously wounded in a shooting. While the team hunts down the gunman in a bid to bring him to justice, the veteran detective has a vision of his late wife Claire (Jaime Ray Newman) and agonises over whether he wants to fight for life or be reunited with her in death. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate when an undercover secret service agent is found murdered in her home. Their first suspect is the victim's husband, but complications quickly arise when her work comes under the microscope, and her husband's nefarious activities for a corrupt Congressman are uncovered. US crime drama, starring Chris Noth and Annabella Sciorra

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Nick and Natalie Hammond are selling their family home in Hertfordshire and want to buy somewhere near the coast with more outdoor space for their four children. Nick's keen on a move to Mallorca, having holidayed in Spain as a child, but Natalie would prefer to move to Cornwall. They have a cash budget of £275,000 if they buy in Majorca where Laura Hamilton is on hand to help, or £375,000 if they buy in Cornwall, where Jonnie Irwin tries to beat Laura's properties

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Teenage sweethearts Laura and Stuart Queen have lived in the same house in Carlisle for 16 years but now want a change of location and lifestyle. Stuart wants to move to central Scotland, close to family and work. Horse-lover Laura thinks they'll get more property and land in Murcia in Spain. Jonnie Irwin tries to please them both with a budget of £150,000 in central Scotland and Laura Hamilton tempts them with properties in Spain for a budget of £120,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
