programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The home potters are tested on the art of Japanese-style ceramics. For the main challenge, they throw a sake set, consisting of one bottle and six identical cups. The exciting part, however, comes during the firing, when they use a risky 16th-century method in which they pull their burning pieces out of the kiln and plunge them into a bin full of combustible materials. For the spot test, they must pierce and carve an intricate design into a lantern using a technique known as the 'devil's work', and the throw down sees them back at the wheel, making as many rice bowls as they can in 15 minutes

programme.title: Taken at Birth
programme.desc: In the mid-1940s, Dr Thomas Jugarthy Hicks opened the Hicks Community Clinic in McCaysville, Georgia. Within a decade, he was not only performing illegal abortions but selling newborns on the black market. Jane Blasio now works to reunite those 'stolen' babies with their biological families. Plus, she uncovers some shocking truths about Dr Hicks himself, who sold hundreds of babies in the 1950s and 1960s. Now, some Hicks babies are reunited with their families, and some are learning about relatives they never got to meet

programme.title: Taken at Birth
programme.desc: After a tireless search for Diane's birth father, Lisa and Jane are finally able to track down a possible match. Plus, Chris makes another discovery about Dr Thomas Hicks

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Secret Army

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: Crimes at the Dark House ()
programme.desc: A criminal murders an aristocrat, planning to assume his identity - but is disappointed to discover the man he has replaced is heavily in debt. He then plots to marry a wealthy heiress for her fortune, but is forced to kill anyone who comes close to learning his true identity. Horror based on Wilkie Collins' The Woman in White, starring Tod Slaughter and Sylvia Marriott

programme.title: Gaiety George (1948)
programme.desc: An Irish music hall impresario comes to London to seek his fortune, and makes it big by buying a rundown theatre and transforming it into a major attraction. Drama based on the life of impresario George Edwardes, starring Richard Greene, Ann Todd, Hazel Court, Charles Victor and Peter Graves

programme.title: Henry V (1989)
programme.desc: The English king leads his armies into war to reclaim control of France - culminating in a pivotal confrontation with much larger enemy forces on the fields of Agincourt. Adaptation of Shakespeare's historical play, directed by and starring Kenneth Branagh. With Derek Jacobi, Brian Blessed, Emma Thompson, Ian Holm, Robert Stephens and a young Christian Bale

programme.title: Man About the House (1974)
programme.desc: Student chef Robin and his two female flatmates discover the council is planning to demolish the terrace where they live. Their landlord is happy to take the money being offered for his property, but his wife sides with the tenants in fighting the plan. Movie version of the 1970s sitcom, starring Richard O'Sullivan, Paula Wilcox, Sally Thomsett, Yootha Joyce and Brian Murphy

programme.title: The Angry Silence (1960)
programme.desc: A factory worker is suspicious of a new employee who persuades the workforce to go on strike, and so steadfastly refuses to join in the protest. He finds himself an outcast, but is unwilling to back down despite the fierce reprisals from his former friends. Drama, starring Richard Attenborough and Michael Craig

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: My One True Love ()
programme.desc: An award-winning short film set and filmed during lockdown. An accidental video call from Margaret to Juliet brings an unexpected moment of precious happiness

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: London-based current affair series, with Michael Hayman

programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old shepherd Phillip Mellin goes to Skipton Auction Mart hoping to buy a dog he can train, while his mother Carol tries to sell her four-legged friend Jess. Tom Orde-Powlett sets up a boar park at Bolton Castle in Wensleydale, and Adrian Edmondson meets the Leyburn Band during preparations for the Hardraw Scar Brass Band Contest

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: The Leyburn Band takes part in the Hardraw Scar Brass Band Contest, while Amanda Owen and her husband Clive renovate a shepherd's hut on their land. Plus, Adrian Edmondson meets the new landlords of the area's first community-run pub, the George and Dragon in Hudswell, Richmondshire

programme.title: National Treasure
programme.desc: Marie encounters with one of her husband's accusers, and is left shaken by a difficult interview with his barrister. Both experiences leave her questioning whether it was love, or denial, that allowed her to remain loyal to Paul for so long - despite his many affairs. Meanwhile, Gerry manages to dig up some evidence that seems to thoroughly discredit one of Paul's key accusers. However, making use of this new knowledge will mean Paul has to make an uncomfortable decision. Legal drama, starring Robbie Coltrane, Julie Walters and Kerry Fox

programme.title: The Baker (2007)
programme.desc: A hitman has second thoughts about his career and seeks refuge as a baker in a rural Welsh village. Comedy thriller, starring Damian Lewis and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau

programme.title: Robert the Bruce (2019)
programme.desc: Following the execution of William Wallace, Robert the Bruce has suffered a number of losses. Ex-communicated and with a large bounty on his head, the wounded, hunted warrior seeks refuge with a single mother and her family, and reflects on the choices he must make if he wishes to lead Scotland to victory. Drama, starring Angus Macfadyen, Jared Harris, Anna Hutchison and Patrick Fugit

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: Live County Championship Cricket
programme.desc: Surrey v Middlesex. Coverage of day two of the County Championship match from The Kia Oval. The two sides played the reverse fixture at the end of April as Middlesex came out worthy winners with a 10-wicket victory over their local rivals. Toby Roland-Jones took seven wickets across the match to leave the hosts chasing just 18 to win the match after Surrey collapsed on the third day.
